    37  var _ = Describe(`PostureManagementV2`, func() {
    38  	var testServer *httptest.Server
    39  	Describe(`Service constructor tests`, func() {
    40  		It(`Instantiate service client`, func() {
    41  			postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
    42  				Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
    43  			})
    44  			Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
    45  			Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
    46  		})
    47  		It(`Instantiate service client with error: Invalid URL`, func() {
    48  			postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
    49  				URL: "{BAD_URL_STRING",
    50  			})
    51  			Expect(postureManagementService).To(BeNil())
    52  			Expect(serviceErr).ToNot(BeNil())
    53  		})
    54  		It(`Instantiate service client with error: Invalid Auth`, func() {

    56  				URL: "https://posturemanagementv2/api",
    57  				Authenticator: &core.BasicAuthenticator{

    59  					Password: "",

    63  			Expect(serviceErr).ToNot(BeNil())
    64  		})
    65  	})
    66  	Describe(`Service constructor tests using external config`, func() {
    67  		Context(`Using external config, construct service client instances`, func() {
    68  			// Map containing environment variables used in testing.
    69  			var testEnvironment = map[string]string{
    70  				"POSTURE_MANAGEMENT_URL":       "https://posturemanagementv2/api",
    71  				"POSTURE_MANAGEMENT_AUTH_TYPE": "noauth",
    72  			}
    73  
    74  			It(`Create service client using external config successfully`, func() {
    75  				SetTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
    76  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2UsingExternalConfig(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{})
    77  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
    78  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
    79  				ClearTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
    80  
    81  				clone := postureManagementService.Clone()
    82  				Expect(clone).ToNot(BeNil())
    83  				Expect(clone.Service != postureManagementService.Service).To(BeTrue())
    84  				Expect(clone.GetServiceURL()).To(Equal(postureManagementService.GetServiceURL()))
    85  				Expect(clone.Service.Options.Authenticator).To(Equal(postureManagementService.Service.Options.Authenticator))
    86  			})
    87  			It(`Create service client using external config and set url from constructor successfully`, func() {
    88  				SetTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
    89  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2UsingExternalConfig(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
    90  					URL: "https://testService/api",
    91  				})
    92  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
    93  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
    94  				Expect(postureManagementService.Service.GetServiceURL()).To(Equal("https://testService/api"))
    95  				ClearTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
    96  
    97  				clone := postureManagementService.Clone()
    98  				Expect(clone).ToNot(BeNil())
    99  				Expect(clone.Service != postureManagementService.Service).To(BeTrue())
   100  				Expect(clone.GetServiceURL()).To(Equal(postureManagementService.GetServiceURL()))
   101  				Expect(clone.Service.Options.Authenticator).To(Equal(postureManagementService.Service.Options.Authenticator))
   102  			})
   103  			It(`Create service client using external config and set url programatically successfully`, func() {
   104  				SetTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
   105  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2UsingExternalConfig(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{})
   106  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("https://testService/api")
   107  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   108  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   109  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   110  				Expect(postureManagementService.Service.GetServiceURL()).To(Equal("https://testService/api"))
   111  				ClearTestEnvironment(testEnvironment)
   112  
   113  				clone := postureManagementService.Clone()
   114  				Expect(clone).ToNot(BeNil())
   115  				Expect(clone.Service != postureManagementService.Service).To(BeTrue())
   116  				Expect(clone.GetServiceURL()).To(Equal(postureManagementService.GetServiceURL()))
   117  				Expect(clone.Service.Options.Authenticator).To(Equal(postureManagementService.Service.Options.Authenticator))

   154  	Describe(`Regional endpoint tests`, func() {
   155  		It(`GetServiceURLForRegion(region string)`, func() {

   162  		})
   163  	})
   164  	Describe(`Parameterized URL tests`, func() {
   165  		It(`Format parameterized URL with all default values`, func() {
   166  			constructedURL, err := posturemanagementv2.ConstructServiceURL(nil)

   168  			Expect(constructedURL).ToNot(BeNil())
   169  			Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   170  		})
   171  		It(`Return an error if a provided variable name is invalid`, func() {
   172  			var providedUrlVariables = map[string]string{
   173  				"invalid_variable_name": "value",
   174  			}
   175  			constructedURL, err := posturemanagementv2.ConstructServiceURL(providedUrlVariables)
   176  			Expect(constructedURL).To(Equal(""))
   177  			Expect(err).ToNot(BeNil())
   178  		})
   179  	})
   180  	Describe(`CreateCredential(createCredentialOptions *CreateCredentialOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
   181  		createCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials"
   182  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
   183  			BeforeEach(func() {
   184  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   185  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   186  
   187  					// Verify the contents of the request
   188  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCredentialPath))
   189  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
   190  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   191  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   192  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   193  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   194  					res.WriteHeader(201)
   195  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
   196  				}))
   197  			})
   198  			It(`Invoke CreateCredential with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
   199  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   200  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   201  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   202  				})
   203  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   204  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   205  
   206  				// Construct an instance of the NewCredentialDisplayFields model
   207  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.NewCredentialDisplayFields)
   208  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.IBMAPIKey = core.StringPtr("sample_api_key")
   209  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsClientID = core.StringPtr("sample_client_id")
   210  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsClientSecret = core.StringPtr("*********")
   211  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsRegion = core.StringPtr("test_region")
   212  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsArn = core.StringPtr("sample_arn")
   213  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Username = core.StringPtr("test")
   214  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Password = core.StringPtr("**********")
   215  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientID = core.StringPtr("azure_124")
   216  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientSecret = core.StringPtr("************")
   217  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureSubscriptionID = core.StringPtr("A32432890")
   218  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureResourceGroup = core.StringPtr("azure_res_type")
   219  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.DatabaseName = core.StringPtr("sample_db_name")
   220  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmAuthtype = core.StringPtr("sample_auth_type")
   221  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmUsessl = core.StringPtr("ssl_test")
   222  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmPort = core.StringPtr("80")
   223  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientID = core.StringPtr("ms_client_id")
   224  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientSecret = core.StringPtr("ms_client_secret")
   225  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365TenantID = core.StringPtr("ns_tenant_id")
   226  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AuthURL = core.StringPtr("test.example.com")
   227  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectName = core.StringPtr("test_proj")
   228  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.UserDomainName = core.StringPtr("user_domain")
   229  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectDomainName = core.StringPtr("stack_domain_name")
   230  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemFileName = core.StringPtr("testpemfile.pem")
   231  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemData = core.StringPtr("testString")
   232  
   233  				// Construct an instance of the CredentialGroup model
   234  				credentialGroupModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialGroup)
   235  				credentialGroupModel.ID = core.StringPtr("1")
   236  				credentialGroupModel.Passphrase = core.StringPtr("passphrase")
   237  
   238  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCredentialOptions model
   239  				createCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateCredentialOptions)
   240  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Enabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
   241  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("username_password")
   242  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("test_create")
   243  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This credential is used for testing.")
   244  				createCredentialOptionsModel.DisplayFields = newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel
   245  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Group = credentialGroupModel
   246  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Purpose = core.StringPtr("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")
   247  				createCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   248  				createCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   249  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   250  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
   251  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCredential(createCredentialOptionsModel)
   252  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   253  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   254  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   255  
   256  				// Enable retries and test again
   257  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   258  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateCredential(createCredentialOptionsModel)
   259  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   260  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   261  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   262  			})
   263  			AfterEach(func() {
   264  				testServer.Close()
   265  			})
   266  		})
   267  	})
   268  	Describe(`CreateCredential(createCredentialOptions *CreateCredentialOptions)`, func() {
   269  		createCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials"
   270  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
   271  			BeforeEach(func() {
   272  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   273  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   274  
   275  					// Verify the contents of the request
   276  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCredentialPath))
   277  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
   278  
   279  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
   280  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
   281  
   282  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
   283  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
   284  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
   285  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
   286  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   287  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
   288  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   289  					} else {
   290  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
   291  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   292  					}
   293  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
   294  
   295  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   296  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   297  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   298  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
   299  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
   300  
   301  					// Set mock response
   302  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   303  					res.WriteHeader(201)
   304  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}`)
   305  				}))
   306  			})
   307  			It(`Invoke CreateCredential successfully with retries`, func() {
   308  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   309  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   310  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   311  				})
   312  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   313  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   314  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   315  
   316  				// Construct an instance of the NewCredentialDisplayFields model
   317  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.NewCredentialDisplayFields)
   318  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.IBMAPIKey = core.StringPtr("sample_api_key")
   319  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsClientID = core.StringPtr("sample_client_id")
   320  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsClientSecret = core.StringPtr("*********")
   321  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsRegion = core.StringPtr("test_region")
   322  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsArn = core.StringPtr("sample_arn")
   323  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Username = core.StringPtr("test")
   324  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Password = core.StringPtr("**********")
   325  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientID = core.StringPtr("azure_124")
   326  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientSecret = core.StringPtr("************")
   327  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureSubscriptionID = core.StringPtr("A32432890")
   328  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureResourceGroup = core.StringPtr("azure_res_type")
   329  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.DatabaseName = core.StringPtr("sample_db_name")
   330  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmAuthtype = core.StringPtr("sample_auth_type")
   331  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmUsessl = core.StringPtr("ssl_test")
   332  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmPort = core.StringPtr("80")
   333  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientID = core.StringPtr("ms_client_id")
   334  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientSecret = core.StringPtr("ms_client_secret")
   335  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365TenantID = core.StringPtr("ns_tenant_id")
   336  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AuthURL = core.StringPtr("test.example.com")
   337  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectName = core.StringPtr("test_proj")
   338  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.UserDomainName = core.StringPtr("user_domain")
   339  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectDomainName = core.StringPtr("stack_domain_name")
   340  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemFileName = core.StringPtr("testpemfile.pem")
   341  				newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemData = core.StringPtr("testString")
   342  
   343  				// Construct an instance of the CredentialGroup model
   344  				credentialGroupModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialGroup)
   345  				credentialGroupModel.ID = core.StringPtr("1")
   346  				credentialGroupModel.Passphrase = core.StringPtr("passphrase")
   347  
   348  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCredentialOptions model
   349  				createCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateCredentialOptions)
   350  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Enabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
   351  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("username_password")
   352  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("test_create")
   353  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This credential is used for testing.")
   354  				createCredentialOptionsModel.DisplayFields = newCredentialDisplayFieldsModel
   355  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Group = credentialGroupModel
   356  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Purpose = core.StringPtr("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")
   357  				createCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   358  				createCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   359  				createCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   360  
   361  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
   362  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
   363  				defer cancelFunc()
   364  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCredentialWithContext(ctx, createCredentialOptionsModel)
   365  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   366  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
   367  
   368  				// Disable retries and test again
   369  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
   370  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCredential(createCredentialOptionsModel)
   371  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
   372  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   373  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
   374  
   375  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
   376  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
   377  				defer cancelFunc2()
   378  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateCredentialWithContext(ctx, createCredentialOptionsModel)
   379  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   380  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
   381  			})
   382  			AfterEach(func() {
   383  				testServer.Close()
   384  			})
   385  		})
   386  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
   387  			BeforeEach(func() {
   388  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   389  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   390  
   391  					// Verify the contents of the request
   392  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCredentialPath))
   393  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
   394  
   395  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
   396  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
   397  
   398  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
   399  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
   400  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
   401  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
   402  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   403  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
   404  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   405  					} else {
   406  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
   407  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   408  					}
   409  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
   410  
   411  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   412  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   413  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   414  					// Set mock response
   415  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   416  					res.WriteHeader(201)
   417  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}`)
   418  				}))
   419  			})
   420  			It(`Invoke CreateCredential successfully`, func() {
   421  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

   633  	Describe(`ListCredentials(listCredentialsOptions *ListCredentialsOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
   634  		listCredentialsPath := "/posture/v2/credentials"
   635  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
   636  			BeforeEach(func() {
   637  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   638  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   639  
   640  					// Verify the contents of the request
   641  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listCredentialsPath))
   642  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
   643  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   644  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   645  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   646  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
   647  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
   648  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   649  					res.WriteHeader(200)
   650  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
   651  				}))
   652  			})
   653  			It(`Invoke ListCredentials with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
   654  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   655  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   656  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   657  				})
   658  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   659  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   660  
   661  				// Construct an instance of the ListCredentialsOptions model
   662  				listCredentialsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListCredentialsOptions)
   663  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   664  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
   665  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
   666  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   667  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   668  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
   669  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCredentials(listCredentialsOptionsModel)
   670  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   671  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   672  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   673  
   674  				// Enable retries and test again
   675  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   676  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListCredentials(listCredentialsOptionsModel)
   677  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   678  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   679  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   680  			})
   681  			AfterEach(func() {
   682  				testServer.Close()
   683  			})
   684  		})
   685  	})
   686  	Describe(`ListCredentials(listCredentialsOptions *ListCredentialsOptions)`, func() {
   687  		listCredentialsPath := "/posture/v2/credentials"
   688  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
   689  			BeforeEach(func() {
   690  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   691  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   692  
   693  					// Verify the contents of the request
   694  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listCredentialsPath))
   695  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
   696  
   697  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   698  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   699  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   700  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
   701  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
   702  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
   703  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
   704  
   705  					// Set mock response
   706  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   707  					res.WriteHeader(200)
   708  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "credentials": [{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}]}`)
   709  				}))
   710  			})
   711  			It(`Invoke ListCredentials successfully with retries`, func() {
   712  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   713  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   714  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   715  				})
   716  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   717  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   718  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   719  
   720  				// Construct an instance of the ListCredentialsOptions model
   721  				listCredentialsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListCredentialsOptions)
   722  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   723  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
   724  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
   725  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   726  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   727  
   728  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
   729  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
   730  				defer cancelFunc()
   731  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCredentialsWithContext(ctx, listCredentialsOptionsModel)
   732  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   733  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
   734  
   735  				// Disable retries and test again
   736  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
   737  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCredentials(listCredentialsOptionsModel)
   738  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
   739  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   740  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
   741  
   742  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
   743  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
   744  				defer cancelFunc2()
   745  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListCredentialsWithContext(ctx, listCredentialsOptionsModel)
   746  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   747  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
   748  			})
   749  			AfterEach(func() {
   750  				testServer.Close()
   751  			})
   752  		})
   753  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
   754  			BeforeEach(func() {
   755  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   756  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   757  
   758  					// Verify the contents of the request
   759  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listCredentialsPath))
   760  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
   761  
   762  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   763  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   764  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   765  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))

   771  				}))
   772  			})
   773  			It(`Invoke ListCredentials successfully`, func() {
   774  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   775  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   776  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   777  				})
   778  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   779  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   780

   791  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
   792  				listCredentialsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")

   795  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)

   797  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
   798  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   799  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
   800  
   801  			})

   867  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
   868  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
   869  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialList)
   870  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
   871  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
   872  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
   873  
   874  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
   875  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   876  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
   877  			})
   878  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
   879  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialList)
   880  
   881  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
   882  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   883  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
   884  			})
   885  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
   886  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialList)
   887  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
   888  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
   889  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
   890  
   891  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
   892  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
   893  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
   894  			})
   895  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
   896  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.CredentialList)
   897  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
   898  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
   899  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
   900  
   901  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
   902  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
   903  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
   904  			})
   905  		})
   906  	})
   907  	Describe(`GetCredential(getCredentialOptions *GetCredentialOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
   908  		getCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials/testString"
   909  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
   910  			BeforeEach(func() {
   911  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   912  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   913  
   914  					// Verify the contents of the request
   915  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getCredentialPath))
   916  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
   917  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   918  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   919  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   920  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   921  					res.WriteHeader(200)
   922  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
   923  				}))
   924  			})
   925  			It(`Invoke GetCredential with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
   926  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   927  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   928  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   929  				})
   930  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   931  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   932  
   933  				// Construct an instance of the GetCredentialOptions model
   934  				getCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetCredentialOptions)
   935  				getCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   936  				getCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   937  				getCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   938  				getCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   939  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
   940  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCredential(getCredentialOptionsModel)
   941  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   942  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   943  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   944  
   945  				// Enable retries and test again
   946  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   947  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetCredential(getCredentialOptionsModel)
   948  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
   949  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
   950  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
   951  			})
   952  			AfterEach(func() {
   953  				testServer.Close()
   954  			})
   955  		})
   956  	})
   957  	Describe(`GetCredential(getCredentialOptions *GetCredentialOptions)`, func() {
   958  		getCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials/testString"
   959  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
   960  			BeforeEach(func() {
   961  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
   962  					defer GinkgoRecover()
   963  
   964  					// Verify the contents of the request
   965  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getCredentialPath))
   966  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
   967  
   968  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
   969  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
   970  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
   971  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
   972  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
   973  
   974  					// Set mock response
   975  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
   976  					res.WriteHeader(200)
   977  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}`)
   978  				}))
   979  			})
   980  			It(`Invoke GetCredential successfully with retries`, func() {
   981  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
   982  					URL:           testServer.URL,
   983  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
   984  				})
   985  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
   986  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
   987  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
   988  
   989  				// Construct an instance of the GetCredentialOptions model
   990  				getCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetCredentialOptions)
   991  				getCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   992  				getCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   993  				getCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
   994  				getCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
   995  
   996  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
   997  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
   998  				defer cancelFunc()
   999  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCredentialWithContext(ctx, getCredentialOptionsModel)
  1000  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1001  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1002  
  1003  				// Disable retries and test again
  1004  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  1005  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCredential(getCredentialOptionsModel)
  1006  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  1007  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1008  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  1009  
  1010  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  1011  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  1012  				defer cancelFunc2()
  1013  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetCredentialWithContext(ctx, getCredentialOptionsModel)
  1014  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1015  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1016  			})
  1017  			AfterEach(func() {
  1018  				testServer.Close()
  1019  			})
  1020  		})
  1021  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  1022  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1023  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1024  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1025  
  1026  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1027  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getCredentialPath))
  1028  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  1029  
  1030  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1031  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1032  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1033  					// Set mock response
  1034  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1035  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  1036  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}`)
  1037  				}))
  1038  			})
  1039  			It(`Invoke GetCredential successfully`, func() {
  1040  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1041  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1042  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1043  				})
  1044  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1045  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1046  
  1047  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  1048  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCredential(nil)
  1049  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  1050  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1051  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1052  
  1053  				// Construct an instance of the GetCredentialOptions model

  1055  				getCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1056  				getCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1057  				getCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1058  				getCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1059

  1062  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())

  1067  			It(`Invoke GetCredential with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  1068  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1069  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1070  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1071  				})
  1072  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1073  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1074  
  1075  				// Construct an instance of the GetCredentialOptions model
  1076  				getCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetCredentialOptions)
  1077  				getCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1078  				getCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1079  				getCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1080  				getCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1081  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)
  1082  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("")
  1083  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1084  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCredential(getCredentialOptionsModel)
  1085  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1086  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring(core.ERRORMSG_SERVICE_URL_MISSING))
  1087  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1088  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1089  				// Construct a second instance of the GetCredentialOptions model with no property values

  1091  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)

  1138  	Describe(`UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptions *UpdateCredentialOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  1139  		updateCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials/testString"
  1140  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  1141  			BeforeEach(func() {

  1143  					defer GinkgoRecover()

  1147  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  1148  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1149  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1150  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))

  1154  				}))
  1155  			})

  1159  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  1171  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Username = core.StringPtr("test")

  1174  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientSecret = core.StringPtr("************")
  1175  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureSubscriptionID = core.StringPtr("A32432890")
  1176  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureResourceGroup = core.StringPtr("azure_res_type")
  1177  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.DatabaseName = core.StringPtr("sample_db_name")
  1178  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmAuthtype = core.StringPtr("sample_auth_type")
  1179  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmUsessl = core.StringPtr("ssl_test")
  1180  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmPort = core.StringPtr("80")
  1181  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientID = core.StringPtr("ms_client_id")
  1182  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientSecret = core.StringPtr("ms_client_secret")
  1183  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365TenantID = core.StringPtr("ms_tenant_id")
  1184  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AuthURL = core.StringPtr("test.example.com")
  1185  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectName = core.StringPtr("test_proj")
  1186  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.UserDomainName = core.StringPtr("user_domain")
  1187  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectDomainName = core.StringPtr("stack_domain_name")
  1188  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemFileName = core.StringPtr("testpemfile.pem")
  1189  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemData = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1190  
  1191  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCredentialOptions model
  1192  				updateCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCredentialOptions)
  1193  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1194  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Enabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1195  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("username_password")
  1196  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("test_create")
  1197  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This credential is used for testing.")
  1198  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.DisplayFields = updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel
  1199  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Purpose = core.StringPtr("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")
  1200  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1201  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1202  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1203  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  1204  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1205  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1206  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1207  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1208  
  1209  				// Enable retries and test again
  1210  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  1211  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1212  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1213  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1214  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1215  			})
  1216  			AfterEach(func() {
  1217  				testServer.Close()
  1218  			})
  1219  		})
  1220  	})
  1221  	Describe(`UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptions *UpdateCredentialOptions)`, func() {
  1222  		updateCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials/testString"
  1223  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  1224  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1225  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1226  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1227  
  1228  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1229  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateCredentialPath))
  1230  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  1231  
  1232  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  1233  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  1234  
  1235  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  1236  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  1237  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  1238  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  1239  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1240  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  1241  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1242  					} else {
  1243  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  1244  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1245  					}
  1246  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  1247  
  1248  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1249  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1250  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1251  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  1252  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  1253  
  1254  					// Set mock response
  1255  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1256  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  1257  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"enabled": true, "id": "57", "type": "username_password", "name": "test_username", "description": "test_description", "display_fields": {"ibm_api_key": "sample_api_key", "aws_client_id": "sample_client_id", "aws_client_secret": "*********", "aws_region": "test_region", "aws_arn": "sample_arn", "username": "sample_username", "password": "************", "azure_client_id": "azure_124", "azure_client_secret": "************", "azure_subscription_id": "A32432890", "azure_resource_group": "azure_res_type", "database_name": "sample_db_name", "winrm_authtype": "sample_auth_type", "winrm_usessl": "ssl_test", "winrm_port": "80", "ms_365_client_id": "ms_client_id", "ms_365_client_secret": "ms_client_secret", "ms_365_tenant_id": "ms_tenant_id", "auth_url": "test.example.com", "project_name": "test_proj", "user_domain_name": "user_domain", "project_domain_name": "stack_domain_name"}, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_by": "IBMid-5500081P5M", "group": {"id": "ID", "passphrase": "Passphrase"}, "purpose": "discovery_fact_collection_remediation"}`)
  1258  				}))
  1259  			})
  1260  			It(`Invoke UpdateCredential successfully with retries`, func() {
  1261  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1262  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1263  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1264  				})
  1265  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1266  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1267  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  1268  
  1269  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCredentialDisplayFields model
  1270  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCredentialDisplayFields)
  1271  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.IBMAPIKey = core.StringPtr("sample_api_key")
  1272  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AwsClientID = core.StringPtr("sample_client_id")

  1277  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Password = core.StringPtr("**********")
  1278  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientID = core.StringPtr("azure_124")
  1279  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientSecret = core.StringPtr("************")
  1280  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureSubscriptionID = core.StringPtr("A32432890")
  1281  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureResourceGroup = core.StringPtr("azure_res_type")
  1282  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.DatabaseName = core.StringPtr("sample_db_name")
  1283  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmAuthtype = core.StringPtr("sample_auth_type")
  1284  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmUsessl = core.StringPtr("ssl_test")
  1285  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmPort = core.StringPtr("80")
  1286  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientID = core.StringPtr("ms_client_id")
  1287  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientSecret = core.StringPtr("ms_client_secret")
  1288  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365TenantID = core.StringPtr("ms_tenant_id")
  1289  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AuthURL = core.StringPtr("test.example.com")
  1290  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectName = core.StringPtr("test_proj")
  1291  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.UserDomainName = core.StringPtr("user_domain")
  1292  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectDomainName = core.StringPtr("stack_domain_name")
  1293  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemFileName = core.StringPtr("testpemfile.pem")
  1294  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemData = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1295  
  1296  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCredentialOptions model
  1297  				updateCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCredentialOptions)
  1298  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1299  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Enabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1300  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("username_password")
  1301  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("test_create")
  1302  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This credential is used for testing.")
  1303  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.DisplayFields = updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel
  1304  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Purpose = core.StringPtr("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")
  1305  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1306  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1307  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1308  
  1309  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  1310  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  1311  				defer cancelFunc()
  1312  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCredentialWithContext(ctx, updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1313  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1314  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1315  
  1316  				// Disable retries and test again
  1317  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  1318  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1319  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  1320  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1321  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  1322  
  1323  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  1324  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  1325  				defer cancelFunc2()
  1326  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCredentialWithContext(ctx, updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1327  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1328  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1329  			})
  1330  			AfterEach(func() {
  1331  				testServer.Close()
  1332  			})
  1333  		})
  1334  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {

  1432  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  1434  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1435  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1436  
  1437  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCredentialDisplayFields model

  1446  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientID = core.StringPtr("azure_124")
  1447  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureClientSecret = core.StringPtr("************")
  1448  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureSubscriptionID = core.StringPtr("A32432890")
  1449  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AzureResourceGroup = core.StringPtr("azure_res_type")
  1450  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.DatabaseName = core.StringPtr("sample_db_name")
  1451  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmAuthtype = core.StringPtr("sample_auth_type")
  1452  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmUsessl = core.StringPtr("ssl_test")
  1453  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.WinrmPort = core.StringPtr("80")
  1454  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientID = core.StringPtr("ms_client_id")
  1455  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365ClientSecret = core.StringPtr("ms_client_secret")
  1456  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.Ms365TenantID = core.StringPtr("ms_tenant_id")
  1457  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.AuthURL = core.StringPtr("test.example.com")
  1458  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectName = core.StringPtr("test_proj")
  1459  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.UserDomainName = core.StringPtr("user_domain")
  1460  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.ProjectDomainName = core.StringPtr("stack_domain_name")
  1461  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemFileName = core.StringPtr("testpemfile.pem")
  1462  				updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel.PemData = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1463  
  1464  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCredentialOptions model
  1465  				updateCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCredentialOptions)

  1467  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Enabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1468  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("username_password")
  1469  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("test_create")
  1470  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This credential is used for testing.")
  1471  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.DisplayFields = updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel
  1472  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Purpose = core.StringPtr("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")
  1473  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1474  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1475  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1476  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)

  1478  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1479  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCredential(updateCredentialOptionsModel)
  1480  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())

  1482  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1483  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1484  				// Construct a second instance of the UpdateCredentialOptions model with no property values
  1485  				updateCredentialOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCredentialOptions)

  1488  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1489  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1490  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1491  			})

  1493  				testServer.Close()
  1494  			})
  1495  		})
