  1566  	Describe(`DeleteCredential(deleteCredentialOptions *DeleteCredentialOptions)`, func() {
  1567  		deleteCredentialPath := "/posture/v2/credentials/testString"
  1568  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  1569  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1570  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1571  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1572  
  1573  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1574  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(deleteCredentialPath))
  1575  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("DELETE"))
  1576  
  1577  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1578  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1579  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1580  					res.WriteHeader(204)
  1581  				}))
  1582  			})
  1583  			It(`Invoke DeleteCredential successfully`, func() {
  1584  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1585  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1586  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1587  				})
  1588  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1589  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1590  
  1591  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  1592  				response, operationErr := postureManagementService.DeleteCredential(nil)
  1593  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  1594  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1595  
  1596  				// Construct an instance of the DeleteCredentialOptions model
  1597  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.DeleteCredentialOptions)
  1598  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1599  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1600  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1601  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1602  
  1603  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  1604  				response, operationErr = postureManagementService.DeleteCredential(deleteCredentialOptionsModel)
  1605  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  1606  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1607  			})
  1608  			It(`Invoke DeleteCredential with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  1609  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1610  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1611  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1612  				})
  1613  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1614  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1615  
  1616  				// Construct an instance of the DeleteCredentialOptions model
  1617  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.DeleteCredentialOptions)
  1618  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1619  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1620  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1621  				deleteCredentialOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1622  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)
  1623  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("")
  1624  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1625  				response, operationErr := postureManagementService.DeleteCredential(deleteCredentialOptionsModel)
  1626  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1627  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring(core.ERRORMSG_SERVICE_URL_MISSING))
  1628  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1629  				// Construct a second instance of the DeleteCredentialOptions model with no property values
  1630  				deleteCredentialOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.DeleteCredentialOptions)
  1631  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)
  1632  				response, operationErr = postureManagementService.DeleteCredential(deleteCredentialOptionsModelNew)
  1633  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1634  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1635  			})
  1636  			AfterEach(func() {
  1637  				testServer.Close()
  1638  			})
  1639  		})
  1640  	})
  1641  	Describe(`CreateCollector(createCollectorOptions *CreateCollectorOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  1642  		createCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors"
  1643  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  1644  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1645  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1646  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1647  
  1648  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1649  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCollectorPath))
  1650  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  1651  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1652  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1653  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1654  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1655  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  1656  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  1657  				}))
  1658  			})
  1659  			It(`Invoke CreateCollector with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  1660  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1661  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1662  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1663  				})
  1664  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1665  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1666  
  1667  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCollectorOptions model
  1668  				createCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateCollectorOptions)
  1669  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBM-collector-sample")
  1670  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsPublic = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1671  				createCollectorOptionsModel.ManagedBy = core.StringPtr("ibm")
  1672  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("sample collector")
  1673  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Passphrase = core.StringPtr("secret")
  1674  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsUbiImage = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1675  				createCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1676  				createCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1677  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1678  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  1679  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCollector(createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1680  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1681  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1682  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1683  
  1684  				// Enable retries and test again
  1685  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  1686  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateCollector(createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1687  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1688  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1689  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1690  			})
  1691  			AfterEach(func() {
  1692  				testServer.Close()
  1693  			})
  1694  		})
  1695  	})
  1696  	Describe(`CreateCollector(createCollectorOptions *CreateCollectorOptions)`, func() {
  1697  		createCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors"
  1698  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  1699  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1700  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1701  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1702  
  1703  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1704  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCollectorPath))
  1705  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  1706  
  1707  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  1708  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  1709  
  1710  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  1711  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  1712  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  1713  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  1714  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1715  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  1716  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1717  					} else {
  1718  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  1719  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1720  					}
  1721  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  1722  
  1723  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1724  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1725  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1726  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  1727  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  1728  
  1729  					// Set mock response
  1730  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1731  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  1732  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  1733  				}))
  1734  			})
  1735  			It(`Invoke CreateCollector successfully with retries`, func() {
  1736  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1737  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1738  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1739  				})
  1740  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1741  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1742  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  1743  
  1744  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCollectorOptions model
  1745  				createCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateCollectorOptions)
  1746  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBM-collector-sample")
  1747  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsPublic = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1748  				createCollectorOptionsModel.ManagedBy = core.StringPtr("ibm")
  1749  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("sample collector")
  1750  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Passphrase = core.StringPtr("secret")
  1751  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsUbiImage = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1752  				createCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1753  				createCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1754  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1755  
  1756  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  1757  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  1758  				defer cancelFunc()
  1759  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCollectorWithContext(ctx, createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1760  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1761  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1762  
  1763  				// Disable retries and test again
  1764  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  1765  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateCollector(createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1766  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  1767  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1768  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  1769  
  1770  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  1771  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  1772  				defer cancelFunc2()
  1773  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateCollectorWithContext(ctx, createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1774  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1775  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  1776  			})
  1777  			AfterEach(func() {
  1778  				testServer.Close()
  1779  			})
  1780  		})
  1781  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  1782  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1783  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1784  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1785  
  1786  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1787  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createCollectorPath))
  1788  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  1789  
  1790  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  1791  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  1792  
  1793  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  1794  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  1795  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  1796  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  1797  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1798  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  1799  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1800  					} else {
  1801  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  1802  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  1803  					}
  1804  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  1805  
  1806  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1807  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1808  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1809  					// Set mock response
  1810  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1811  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  1812  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  1813  				}))
  1814  			})
  1815  			It(`Invoke CreateCollector successfully`, func() {
  1816  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1817  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1818  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1819  				})
  1820  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1821  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1822

  1825  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  1826  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1827  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1828  
  1829  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCollectorOptions model
  1830  				createCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateCollectorOptions)

  1832  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsPublic = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1833  				createCollectorOptionsModel.ManagedBy = core.StringPtr("ibm")
  1834  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("sample collector")
  1835  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Passphrase = core.StringPtr("secret")
  1836  				createCollectorOptionsModel.IsUbiImage = core.BoolPtr(true)
  1837  				createCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1838  				createCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1839  				createCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1840  
  1841  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  1842  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateCollector(createCollectorOptionsModel)
  1843  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  1844  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1845  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  1846  
  1847  			})

  1849  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  1852  				})

  1856  				// Construct an instance of the CreateCollectorOptions model

  1880  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  1881  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())

  1885  			})
  1886  		})

  1929  	Describe(`ListCollectors(listCollectorsOptions *ListCollectorsOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  1930  		listCollectorsPath := "/posture/v2/collectors"
  1931  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  1932  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1933  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1934  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1935  
  1936  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1937  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listCollectorsPath))
  1938  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  1939  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1940  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1941  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1942  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1943  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  1944  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  1945  				}))
  1946  			})
  1947  			It(`Invoke ListCollectors with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  1948  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  1949  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  1950  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  1951  				})
  1952  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  1953  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  1954  
  1955  				// Construct an instance of the ListCollectorsOptions model
  1956  				listCollectorsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListCollectorsOptions)
  1957  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1958  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  1959  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  1960  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  1961  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCollectors(listCollectorsOptionsModel)
  1962  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1963  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1964  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1965  
  1966  				// Enable retries and test again
  1967  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  1968  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListCollectors(listCollectorsOptionsModel)
  1969  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  1970  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  1971  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  1972  			})
  1973  			AfterEach(func() {
  1974  				testServer.Close()
  1975  			})
  1976  		})
  1977  	})
  1978  	Describe(`ListCollectors(listCollectorsOptions *ListCollectorsOptions)`, func() {
  1979  		listCollectorsPath := "/posture/v2/collectors"
  1980  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  1981  			BeforeEach(func() {
  1982  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  1983  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  1984  
  1985  					// Verify the contents of the request
  1986  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listCollectorsPath))
  1987  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  1988  
  1989  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  1990  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  1991  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  1992  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  1993  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  1994  
  1995  					// Set mock response
  1996  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  1997  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  1998  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 6, "limit": 5, "total_count": 10, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "collectors": [{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}]}`)
  1999  				}))
  2000  			})
  2001  			It(`Invoke ListCollectors successfully with retries`, func() {
  2002  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2003  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2004  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2005  				})
  2006  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2007  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2008  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2009  
  2010  				// Construct an instance of the ListCollectorsOptions model
  2011  				listCollectorsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListCollectorsOptions)
  2012  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2013  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2014  				listCollectorsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2015  
  2016  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  2017  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2018  				defer cancelFunc()
  2019  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCollectorsWithContext(ctx, listCollectorsOptionsModel)
  2020  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2021  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2022  
  2023  				// Disable retries and test again
  2024  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  2025  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListCollectors(listCollectorsOptionsModel)
  2026  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2027  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2028  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  2029  
  2030  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  2031  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2032  				defer cancelFunc2()
  2033  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListCollectorsWithContext(ctx, listCollectorsOptionsModel)
  2034  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2035  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2036  			})
  2037  			AfterEach(func() {
  2038  				testServer.Close()
  2039  			})
  2040  		})
  2041  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  2042  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2043  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2044  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2045

  2049

  2051  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2052  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2053  					// Set mock response
  2054  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2055  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2056  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 6, "limit": 5, "total_count": 10, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "collectors": [{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}]}`)
  2057  				}))
  2058  			})
  2059  			It(`Invoke ListCollectors successfully`, func() {
  2060  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  2128  
  2129  				// Construct an instance of the ListCollectorsOptions model
  2130  				listCollectorsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListCollectorsOptions)

  2137  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2138  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2139  
  2140  				// Verify a nil result
  2141  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2142  			})
  2143  			AfterEach(func() {
  2144  				testServer.Close()
  2145  			})
  2146  		})
  2147  	})
  2148  	Describe(`GetCollector(getCollectorOptions *GetCollectorOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  2149  		getCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors/testString"
  2150  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  2151  			BeforeEach(func() {

  2164  				}))
  2165  			})

  2167  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  2173

  2177  				getCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")

  2185

  2198  	Describe(`GetCollector(getCollectorOptions *GetCollectorOptions)`, func() {
  2199  		getCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors/testString"
  2200  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  2201  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2202  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2203  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2204  
  2205  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2206  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getCollectorPath))
  2207  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  2208  
  2209  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2210  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2211  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2212  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  2213  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  2214  
  2215  					// Set mock response
  2216  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2217  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2218  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  2219  				}))
  2220  			})
  2221  			It(`Invoke GetCollector successfully with retries`, func() {
  2222  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2223  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2224  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2225  				})
  2226  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2227  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2228  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2229  
  2230  				// Construct an instance of the GetCollectorOptions model
  2231  				getCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetCollectorOptions)
  2232  				getCollectorOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2233  				getCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2234  				getCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2235  				getCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2236  
  2237  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  2238  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2239  				defer cancelFunc()
  2240  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCollectorWithContext(ctx, getCollectorOptionsModel)
  2241  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2242  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2243  
  2244  				// Disable retries and test again
  2245  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  2246  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetCollector(getCollectorOptionsModel)
  2247  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2248  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2249  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  2250  
  2251  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  2252  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2253  				defer cancelFunc2()
  2254  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetCollectorWithContext(ctx, getCollectorOptionsModel)
  2255  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2256  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2257  			})
  2258  			AfterEach(func() {
  2259  				testServer.Close()
  2260  			})
  2261  		})
  2262  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  2263  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2264  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2265  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2266  
  2267  					// Verify the contents of the request

  2269  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  2270  
  2271  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2272  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2273  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2274  					// Set mock response
  2275  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2276  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2277  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  2278  				}))
  2279  			})
  2280  			It(`Invoke GetCollector successfully`, func() {
  2281  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2282  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2283  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2284  				})
  2285  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2286  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())

  2288  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)

  2292  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())

  2298  				getCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2299  				getCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}

  2304  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())

  2306  
  2307  			})
  2308  			It(`Invoke GetCollector with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  2309  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  2336  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())

  2340  			})
  2341  		})

  2379  	Describe(`UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptions *UpdateCollectorOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  2380  		updateCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors/testString"
  2381  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  2382  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2383  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2384  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2385  
  2386  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2387  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateCollectorPath))
  2388  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  2389  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2390  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2391  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2392  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2393  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2394  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  2395  				}))
  2396  			})
  2397  			It(`Invoke UpdateCollector with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  2398  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2399  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2400  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2401  				})
  2402  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2403  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2404  
  2405  				// Construct an instance of the CollectorUpdate model
  2406  				collectorUpdateModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CollectorUpdate)
  2407  				collectorUpdateModel.DisplayName = core.StringPtr("test-0112-collector_jj")
  2408  				collectorUpdateModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This collector is used for testing.")
  2409  				collectorUpdateModelAsPatch, asPatchErr := collectorUpdateModel.AsPatch()
  2410  				Expect(asPatchErr).To(BeNil())
  2411  
  2412  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCollectorOptions model
  2413  				updateCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCollectorOptions)
  2414  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2415  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Collector = collectorUpdateModelAsPatch
  2416  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2417  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2418  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2419  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  2420  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2421  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2422  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2423  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2424  
  2425  				// Enable retries and test again
  2426  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2427  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2428  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2429  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2430  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2431  			})
  2432  			AfterEach(func() {
  2433  				testServer.Close()
  2434  			})
  2435  		})
  2436  	})
  2437  	Describe(`UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptions *UpdateCollectorOptions)`, func() {
  2438  		updateCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors/testString"
  2439  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  2440  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2441  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2442  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2443  
  2444  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2445  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateCollectorPath))
  2446  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  2447  
  2448  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  2449  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  2450  
  2451  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  2452  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  2453  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  2454  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  2455  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2456  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  2457  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2458  					} else {
  2459  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  2460  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2461  					}
  2462  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  2463  
  2464  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2465  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2466  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2467  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  2468  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  2469  
  2470  					// Set mock response
  2471  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2472  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2473  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  2474  				}))
  2475  			})
  2476  			It(`Invoke UpdateCollector successfully with retries`, func() {
  2477  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2478  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2479  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2480  				})
  2481  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2482  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2483  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2484  
  2485  				// Construct an instance of the CollectorUpdate model
  2486  				collectorUpdateModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CollectorUpdate)
  2487  				collectorUpdateModel.DisplayName = core.StringPtr("test-0112-collector_jj")
  2488  				collectorUpdateModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This collector is used for testing.")
  2489  				collectorUpdateModelAsPatch, asPatchErr := collectorUpdateModel.AsPatch()
  2490  				Expect(asPatchErr).To(BeNil())
  2491  
  2492  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCollectorOptions model
  2493  				updateCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCollectorOptions)
  2494  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2495  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Collector = collectorUpdateModelAsPatch
  2496  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2497  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2498  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2499  
  2500  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  2501  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2502  				defer cancelFunc()
  2503  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCollectorWithContext(ctx, updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2504  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2505  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2506  
  2507  				// Disable retries and test again
  2508  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  2509  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2510  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2511  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2512  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  2513  
  2514  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  2515  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2516  				defer cancelFunc2()
  2517  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCollectorWithContext(ctx, updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2518  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2519  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2520  			})
  2521  			AfterEach(func() {
  2522  				testServer.Close()
  2523  			})
  2524  		})
  2525  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  2526  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2527  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2528  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2529  
  2530  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2531  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateCollectorPath))
  2532  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  2533  
  2534  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  2535  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  2536  
  2537  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  2538  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  2539  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  2540  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  2541  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2542  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  2543  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2544  					} else {
  2545  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  2546  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  2547  					}
  2548  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  2549  
  2550  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2551  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2552  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2553  					// Set mock response
  2554  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2555  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2556  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "display_name": "DisplayName", "name": "Name", "public_key": "PublicKey", "last_heartbeat": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "status": "ready_to_install", "collector_version": "1.0.0_06141eef8d03443c4c6544bac3ea192c54c83e70", "image_version": "1.0.0_ef6c07f1c622bc5472d29b9b82e9885d23d12e8b", "description": "Description", "created_by": "CreatedBy", "created_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "updated_by": "UpdatedBy", "updated_at": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "enabled": false, "registration_code": "RegistrationCode", "type": "restricted", "credential_public_key": "CredentialPublicKey", "failure_count": 12, "approved_local_gateway_ip": "ApprovedLocalGatewayIP", "approved_internet_gateway_ip": "ApprovedInternetGatewayIP", "last_failed_local_gateway_ip": "LastFailedLocalGatewayIP", "reset_reason": "ResetReason", "hostname": "Test-MacBook-Pro.local", "install_path": "/Users/test/project/containers/collector1", "use_private_endpoint": true, "managed_by": "ibm", "trial_expiry": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "last_failed_internet_gateway_ip": "LastFailedInternetGatewayIP", "status_description": "StatusDescription", "reset_time": "2019-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", "is_public": true, "is_ubi_image": true}`)
  2557  				}))
  2558  			})
  2559  			It(`Invoke UpdateCollector successfully`, func() {
  2560  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2561  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2562  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2563  				})
  2564  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2565  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2566  
  2567  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  2568  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(nil)
  2569  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  2570  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  2571  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2572  
  2573  				// Construct an instance of the CollectorUpdate model
  2574  				collectorUpdateModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CollectorUpdate)
  2575  				collectorUpdateModel.DisplayName = core.StringPtr("test-0112-collector_jj")
  2576  				collectorUpdateModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This collector is used for testing.")
  2577  				collectorUpdateModelAsPatch, asPatchErr := collectorUpdateModel.AsPatch()
  2578  				Expect(asPatchErr).To(BeNil())
  2579  
  2580  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCollectorOptions model
  2581  				updateCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCollectorOptions)
  2582  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2583  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Collector = collectorUpdateModelAsPatch
  2584  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2585  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2586  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2587  
  2588  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  2589  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptionsModel)
  2590  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2591  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2592  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  2593  
  2594  			})
  2595  			It(`Invoke UpdateCollector with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {

  2598  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2599  				})
  2600  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2601  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2602  
  2603  				// Construct an instance of the CollectorUpdate model

  2605  				collectorUpdateModel.DisplayName = core.StringPtr("test-0112-collector_jj")
  2606  				collectorUpdateModel.Description = core.StringPtr("This collector is used for testing.")

  2608  				Expect(asPatchErr).To(BeNil())
  2609  
  2610  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateCollectorOptions model

  2612  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2613  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Collector = collectorUpdateModelAsPatch
  2614  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2615  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2616  				updateCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2617  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)

  2619  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())

  2621  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())

  2623  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  2624  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2625  				// Construct a second instance of the UpdateCollectorOptions model with no property values
  2626  				updateCollectorOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateCollectorOptions)
  2627  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)
  2628  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateCollector(updateCollectorOptionsModelNew)
  2629  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2630  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  2631  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2632  			})
  2633  			AfterEach(func() {
  2634  				testServer.Close()
  2635  			})
  2636  		})

  2682  	Describe(`DeleteCollector(deleteCollectorOptions *DeleteCollectorOptions)`, func() {
  2683  		deleteCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/collectors/testString"
  2684  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  2685  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2686  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2687  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2688  
  2689  					// Verify the contents of the request

  2691  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("DELETE"))
  2692  
  2693  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2694  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2695  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2696  					res.WriteHeader(204)
  2697  				}))
  2698  			})
  2699  			It(`Invoke DeleteCollector successfully`, func() {
  2700  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  2702  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2703  				})
  2704  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2705  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2706  
  2707  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)

  2709  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  2710  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  2711  
  2712  				// Construct an instance of the DeleteCollectorOptions model

  2717  				deleteCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2718  
  2719  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  2720  				response, operationErr = postureManagementService.DeleteCollector(deleteCollectorOptionsModel)
  2721  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2722  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2723  			})
  2724  			It(`Invoke DeleteCollector with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {

  2726  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2727  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2728  				})

  2757  	Describe(`ImportProfiles(importProfilesOptions *ImportProfilesOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  2758  		importProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/import"
  2759  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  2760  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2761  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2762  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2763  
  2764  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2765  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(importProfilesPath))
  2766  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  2767  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2768  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2769  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2770  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2771  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2772  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  2773  				}))
  2774  			})
  2775  			It(`Invoke ImportProfiles with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  2776  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2777  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2778  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2779  				})
  2780  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2781  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2782  
  2783  				// Construct an instance of the ImportProfilesOptions model
  2784  				importProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ImportProfilesOptions)
  2785  				importProfilesOptionsModel.File = CreateMockReader("This is a mock file.")
  2786  				importProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2787  				importProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2788  				importProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2789  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  2790  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ImportProfiles(importProfilesOptionsModel)
  2791  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2792  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2793  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2794  
  2795  				// Enable retries and test again
  2796  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2797  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ImportProfiles(importProfilesOptionsModel)
  2798  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2799  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2800  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  2801  			})
  2802  			AfterEach(func() {
  2803  				testServer.Close()
  2804  			})
  2805  		})
  2806  	})
  2807  	Describe(`ImportProfiles(importProfilesOptions *ImportProfilesOptions)`, func() {
  2808  		importProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/import"
  2809  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  2810  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2811  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2812  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2813  
  2814  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2815  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(importProfilesPath))
  2816  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  2817  
  2818  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  2819  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  2820  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  2821  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  2822  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  2823  
  2824  					// Set mock response
  2825  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  2826  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2827  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"message": "The API processed successfully.", "result": true, "profile_id": "2321"}`)
  2828  				}))
  2829  			})
  2830  			It(`Invoke ImportProfiles successfully with retries`, func() {
  2831  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  2832  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  2833  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  2834  				})
  2835  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  2836  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  2837  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  2838  
  2839  				// Construct an instance of the ImportProfilesOptions model
  2840  				importProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ImportProfilesOptions)
  2841  				importProfilesOptionsModel.File = CreateMockReader("This is a mock file.")
  2842  				importProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2843  				importProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  2844  				importProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  2845  
  2846  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  2847  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2848  				defer cancelFunc()
  2849  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ImportProfilesWithContext(ctx, importProfilesOptionsModel)
  2850  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2851  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2852  
  2853  				// Disable retries and test again
  2854  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  2855  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ImportProfiles(importProfilesOptionsModel)
  2856  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  2857  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  2858  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  2859  
  2860  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  2861  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  2862  				defer cancelFunc2()
  2863  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ImportProfilesWithContext(ctx, importProfilesOptionsModel)
  2864  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  2865  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  2866  			})
  2867  			AfterEach(func() {
  2868  				testServer.Close()
  2869  			})
  2870  		})
  2871  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  2872  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2873  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2874  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2875  
  2876  					// Verify the contents of the request
  2877  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(importProfilesPath))
  2878  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  2879  
  2880  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())

  2885  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  2886  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"message": "The API processed successfully.", "result": true, "profile_id": "2321"}`)
  2887  				}))
  2888  			})

  2988  	Describe(`ListProfiles(listProfilesOptions *ListProfilesOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  2989  		listProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles"
  2990  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  2991  			BeforeEach(func() {
  2992  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  2993  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  2994

  2999  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3000  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3001  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  3002  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  3003  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")

  3005  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  3006  				}))
  3007  			})
  3008  			It(`Invoke ListProfiles with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  3009  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3010  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3011  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3012  				})
  3013  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3014  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3015  
  3016  				// Construct an instance of the ListProfilesOptions model
  3017  				listProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListProfilesOptions)

  3019  				listProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3020  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  3021  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  3022  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3023  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response

  3025  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3026  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3027  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3028  
  3029  				// Enable retries and test again
  3030  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)

  3032  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3033  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3034  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3035  			})
  3036  			AfterEach(func() {
  3037  				testServer.Close()
  3038  			})
  3039  		})
  3040  	})
  3041  	Describe(`ListProfiles(listProfilesOptions *ListProfilesOptions)`, func() {
  3042  		listProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles"
  3043  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  3044  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3045  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3046  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3047  
  3048  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3049  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listProfilesPath))
  3050  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3051  
  3052  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3053  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3054  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3055  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  3056  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  3057  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  3058  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  3059  
  3060  					// Set mock response
  3061  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3062  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3063  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "profiles": [{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "description": "This profile contains controls for the CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0.", "version": 1, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "modified_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "reason_for_delete": "ReasonForDelete", "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}, "id": "3045", "base_profile": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "type": "predefined", "no_of_controls": 1, "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "enabled": true}]}`)
  3064  				}))
  3065  			})
  3066  			It(`Invoke ListProfiles successfully with retries`, func() {
  3067  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3068  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3069  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3070  				})
  3071  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3072  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3073  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3074  
  3075  				// Construct an instance of the ListProfilesOptions model
  3076  				listProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListProfilesOptions)
  3077  				listProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3078  				listProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3079  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  3080  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  3081  				listProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3082  
  3083  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  3084  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3085  				defer cancelFunc()
  3086  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListProfilesWithContext(ctx, listProfilesOptionsModel)
  3087  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3088  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3089  
  3090  				// Disable retries and test again
  3091  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  3092  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListProfiles(listProfilesOptionsModel)
  3093  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3094  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3095  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  3096  
  3097  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  3098  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3099  				defer cancelFunc2()
  3100  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListProfilesWithContext(ctx, listProfilesOptionsModel)
  3101  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3102  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3103  			})
  3104  			AfterEach(func() {
  3105  				testServer.Close()
  3106  			})
  3107  		})
  3108  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  3109  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3110  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3111  					defer GinkgoRecover()
