  3222  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
  3223  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
  3224  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ProfileList)
  3225  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  3226  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
  3227  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  3228  
  3229  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  3230  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3231  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
  3232  			})
  3233  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
  3234  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ProfileList)
  3235  
  3236  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  3237  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3238  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  3239  			})
  3240  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  3241  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ProfileList)
  3242  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  3243  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
  3244  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  3245  
  3246  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  3247  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3248  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  3249  			})
  3250  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  3251  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ProfileList)
  3252  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  3253  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
  3254  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  3255  
  3256  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  3257  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
  3258  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  3259  			})
  3260  		})
  3261  	})
  3262  	Describe(`GetProfile(getProfileOptions *GetProfileOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  3263  		getProfilePath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString"
  3264  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  3265  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3266  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3267  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3268  
  3269  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3270  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getProfilePath))
  3271  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3272  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3273  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3274  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_type"]).To(Equal([]string{"predefined"}))
  3275  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3276  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3277  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3278  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  3279  				}))
  3280  			})
  3281  			It(`Invoke GetProfile with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  3282  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3283  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3284  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3285  				})
  3286  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3287  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3288  
  3289  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileOptions model
  3290  				getProfileOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3291  				getProfileOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3292  				getProfileOptionsModel.ProfileType = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3293  				getProfileOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3294  				getProfileOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3295  				getProfileOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3296  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  3297  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3298  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3299  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3300  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3301  
  3302  				// Enable retries and test again
  3303  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3304  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3305  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3306  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3307  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3308  			})
  3309  			AfterEach(func() {
  3310  				testServer.Close()
  3311  			})
  3312  		})
  3313  	})
  3314  	Describe(`GetProfile(getProfileOptions *GetProfileOptions)`, func() {
  3315  		getProfilePath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString"
  3316  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  3317  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3318  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3319  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3320  
  3321  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3322  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getProfilePath))
  3323  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3324  
  3325  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3326  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3327  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_type"]).To(Equal([]string{"predefined"}))
  3328  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3329  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  3330  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  3331  
  3332  					// Set mock response
  3333  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3334  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3335  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "description": "This profile contains controls for the CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0.", "version": 1, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "modified_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "reason_for_delete": "ReasonForDelete", "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}, "id": "3045", "base_profile": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "type": "predefined", "no_of_controls": 1, "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "enabled": true}`)
  3336  				}))
  3337  			})
  3338  			It(`Invoke GetProfile successfully with retries`, func() {
  3339  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3340  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3341  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3342  				})
  3343  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3344  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3345  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3346  
  3347  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileOptions model
  3348  				getProfileOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3349  				getProfileOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3350  				getProfileOptionsModel.ProfileType = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3351  				getProfileOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3352  				getProfileOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3353  				getProfileOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3354  
  3355  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  3356  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3357  				defer cancelFunc()
  3358  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfileWithContext(ctx, getProfileOptionsModel)
  3359  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3360  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3361  
  3362  				// Disable retries and test again
  3363  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  3364  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3365  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3366  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3367  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  3368  
  3369  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  3370  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3371  				defer cancelFunc2()
  3372  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfileWithContext(ctx, getProfileOptionsModel)
  3373  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3374  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3375  			})
  3376  			AfterEach(func() {
  3377  				testServer.Close()
  3378  			})
  3379  		})
  3380  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  3381  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3382  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3383  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3384  
  3385  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3386  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getProfilePath))
  3387  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3388  
  3389  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3390  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3391  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_type"]).To(Equal([]string{"predefined"}))
  3392  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3393  					// Set mock response
  3394  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3395  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3396  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "description": "This profile contains controls for the CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0.", "version": 1, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "modified_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "reason_for_delete": "ReasonForDelete", "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}, "id": "3045", "base_profile": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "type": "predefined", "no_of_controls": 1, "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "enabled": true}`)
  3397  				}))
  3398  			})
  3399  			It(`Invoke GetProfile successfully`, func() {
  3400  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3401  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3402  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3403  				})
  3404  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3405  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3406  
  3407  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  3408  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfile(nil)
  3409  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  3410  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  3411  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3412  
  3413  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileOptions model
  3414  				getProfileOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3415  				getProfileOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3416  				getProfileOptionsModel.ProfileType = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3417  				getProfileOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3418  				getProfileOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3419  				getProfileOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3420  
  3421  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  3422  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3423  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3424  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3425  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  3426  
  3427  			})
  3428  			It(`Invoke GetProfile with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  3429  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3430  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3431  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3432  				})
  3433  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3434  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3435  
  3436  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileOptions model
  3437  				getProfileOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3438  				getProfileOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3439  				getProfileOptionsModel.ProfileType = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3440  				getProfileOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3441  				getProfileOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3442  				getProfileOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3443  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)
  3444  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("")
  3445  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3446  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3447  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3448  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring(core.ERRORMSG_SERVICE_URL_MISSING))
  3449  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  3450  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3451  				// Construct a second instance of the GetProfileOptions model with no property values
  3452  				getProfileOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3453  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)
  3454  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModelNew)
  3455  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3456  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  3457  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3458  			})
  3459  			AfterEach(func() {
  3460  				testServer.Close()
  3461  			})
  3462  		})
  3463  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with missing response body`, func() {
  3464  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3465  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3466  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3467  
  3468  					// Set success status code with no respoonse body
  3469  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3470  				}))
  3471  			})
  3472  			It(`Invoke GetProfile successfully`, func() {
  3473  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3474  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3475  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3476  				})
  3477  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3478  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3479  
  3480  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileOptions model
  3481  				getProfileOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileOptions)
  3482  				getProfileOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3483  				getProfileOptionsModel.ProfileType = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3484  				getProfileOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3485  				getProfileOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3486  				getProfileOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3487  
  3488  				// Invoke operation
  3489  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfile(getProfileOptionsModel)
  3490  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3491  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3492  
  3493  				// Verify a nil result
  3494  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3495  			})
  3496  			AfterEach(func() {
  3497  				testServer.Close()
  3498  			})
  3499  		})
  3500  	})
  3501  	Describe(`UpdateProfiles(updateProfilesOptions *UpdateProfilesOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  3502  		updateProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString"
  3503  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  3504  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3505  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3506  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3507  
  3508  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3509  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateProfilesPath))
  3510  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  3511  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3512  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3513  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3514  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3515  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3516  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  3517  				}))
  3518  			})
  3519  			It(`Invoke UpdateProfiles with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  3520  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3521  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3522  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3523  				})
  3524  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3525  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3526  
  3527  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateProfilesOptions model
  3528  				updateProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateProfilesOptions)
  3529  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3530  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("AT_Controls_Testing")
  3531  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("AT Controls")
  3532  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.BaseProfile = core.StringPtr("CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0")
  3533  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3534  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.IsEnabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  3535  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.ControlIds = []string{"9980", "9979", "9994"}
  3536  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3537  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3538  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3539  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  3540  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateProfiles(updateProfilesOptionsModel)
  3541  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3542  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3543  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3544  
  3545  				// Enable retries and test again
  3546  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3547  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateProfiles(updateProfilesOptionsModel)
  3548  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3549  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3550  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3551  			})
  3552  			AfterEach(func() {
  3553  				testServer.Close()
  3554  			})
  3555  		})
  3556  	})
  3557  	Describe(`UpdateProfiles(updateProfilesOptions *UpdateProfilesOptions)`, func() {
  3558  		updateProfilesPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString"
  3559  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  3560  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3561  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3562  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3563  
  3564  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3565  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateProfilesPath))
  3566  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  3567  
  3568  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  3569  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  3570  
  3571  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  3572  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  3573  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  3574  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  3575  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3576  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  3577  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3578  					} else {
  3579  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  3580  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3581  					}
  3582  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  3583  
  3584  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3585  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3586  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3587  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  3588  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  3589  
  3590  					// Set mock response
  3591  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3592  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3593  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "description": "This profile contains controls for the CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0.", "version": 1, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "modified_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "reason_for_delete": "ReasonForDelete", "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}, "id": "3045", "base_profile": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "type": "predefined", "no_of_controls": 1, "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "enabled": true}`)
  3594  				}))
  3595  			})
  3596  			It(`Invoke UpdateProfiles successfully with retries`, func() {
  3597  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3598  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3599  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3600  				})
  3601  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3602  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3603  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3604  
  3605  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateProfilesOptions model
  3606  				updateProfilesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateProfilesOptions)
  3607  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3608  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("AT_Controls_Testing")
  3609  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("AT Controls")
  3610  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.BaseProfile = core.StringPtr("CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0")
  3611  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Type = core.StringPtr("predefined")
  3612  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.IsEnabled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  3613  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.ControlIds = []string{"9980", "9979", "9994"}
  3614  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3615  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3616  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3617  
  3618  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  3619  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3620  				defer cancelFunc()
  3621  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateProfilesWithContext(ctx, updateProfilesOptionsModel)
  3622  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3623  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3624  
  3625  				// Disable retries and test again
  3626  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  3627  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateProfiles(updateProfilesOptionsModel)
  3628  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3629  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3630  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  3631  
  3632  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  3633  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3634  				defer cancelFunc2()
  3635  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateProfilesWithContext(ctx, updateProfilesOptionsModel)
  3636  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3637  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3638  			})
  3639  			AfterEach(func() {
  3640  				testServer.Close()
  3641  			})
  3642  		})
  3643  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  3644  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3645  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3646  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3647  
  3648  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3649  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateProfilesPath))
  3650  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  3651  
  3652  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  3653  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  3654  
  3655  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  3656  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  3657  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  3658  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  3659  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3660  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  3661  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3662  					} else {
  3663  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  3664  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  3665  					}
  3666  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  3667  
  3668  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3669  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3670  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3671  					// Set mock response
  3672  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3673  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3674  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "description": "This profile contains controls for the CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0.", "version": 1, "created_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "modified_by": "IBMid-5500081P68", "reason_for_delete": "ReasonForDelete", "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}, "id": "3045", "base_profile": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "type": "predefined", "no_of_controls": 1, "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "enabled": true}`)
  3675  				}))
  3676  			})
  3677  			It(`Invoke UpdateProfiles successfully`, func() {
  3678  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3679  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3680  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3681  				})
  3682  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3683  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3684

  3699  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.ControlIds = []string{"9980", "9979", "9994"}
  3700  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3701  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3702  				updateProfilesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}

  3710  			})

  3869  	Describe(`GetProfileControls(getProfileControlsOptions *GetProfileControlsOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  3870  		getProfileControlsPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString/controls"
  3871  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  3872  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3873  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3874  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3875  
  3876  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3877  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getProfileControlsPath))
  3878  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3879  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3880  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3881  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3882  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  3883  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  3884  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3885  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3886  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  3887  				}))
  3888  			})
  3889  			It(`Invoke GetProfileControls with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  3890  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3891  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3892  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3893  				})
  3894  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3895  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3896  
  3897  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileControlsOptions model
  3898  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileControlsOptions)
  3899  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3900  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3901  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3902  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  3903  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  3904  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3905  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  3906  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfileControls(getProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  3907  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3908  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3909  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3910  
  3911  				// Enable retries and test again
  3912  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3913  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfileControls(getProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  3914  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3915  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3916  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  3917  			})
  3918  			AfterEach(func() {
  3919  				testServer.Close()
  3920  			})
  3921  		})
  3922  	})
  3923  	Describe(`GetProfileControls(getProfileControlsOptions *GetProfileControlsOptions)`, func() {
  3924  		getProfileControlsPath := "/posture/v2/profiles/testString/controls"
  3925  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  3926  			BeforeEach(func() {
  3927  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  3928  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  3929  
  3930  					// Verify the contents of the request
  3931  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getProfileControlsPath))
  3932  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  3933  
  3934  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  3935  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  3936  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  3937  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  3938  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  3939  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  3940  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  3941  
  3942  					// Set mock response
  3943  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  3944  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  3945  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "controls": [{"id": "9979", "description": "Identity and Access Management", "external_control_id": "1.2", "goals": [{"description": "Check whether API keys unused for 180 days are detected and optionally disabled", "id": "3000039", "severity": "Medium", "is_manual": false, "is_remediable": false, "is_reversible": false, "is_automatable": false, "is_auto_remediable": false}]}]}`)
  3946  				}))
  3947  			})
  3948  			It(`Invoke GetProfileControls successfully with retries`, func() {
  3949  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  3950  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  3951  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  3952  				})
  3953  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  3954  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  3955  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  3956  
  3957  				// Construct an instance of the GetProfileControlsOptions model
  3958  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetProfileControlsOptions)
  3959  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3960  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3961  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  3962  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  3963  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  3964  				getProfileControlsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  3965  
  3966  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  3967  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3968  				defer cancelFunc()
  3969  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfileControlsWithContext(ctx, getProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  3970  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3971  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3972  
  3973  				// Disable retries and test again
  3974  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  3975  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetProfileControls(getProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  3976  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  3977  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  3978  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  3979  
  3980  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  3981  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  3982  				defer cancelFunc2()
  3983  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetProfileControlsWithContext(ctx, getProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  3984  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  3985  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  3986  			})
  3987  			AfterEach(func() {
  3988  				testServer.Close()
  3989  			})
  3990  		})

  4115  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
  4116  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
  4117  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4118  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4119  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
  4120  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4121  
  4122  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4123  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4124  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
  4125  			})
  4126  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
  4127  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4128  
  4129  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4130  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4131  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4132  			})
  4133  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  4134  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4135  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4136  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
  4137  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4138  
  4139  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4140  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4141  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4142  			})
  4143  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  4144  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4145  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4146  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
  4147  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4148  
  4149  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4150  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
  4151  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4152  			})
  4153  		})
  4154  	})

  4319  
  4320  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  4321  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetGroupProfileControls(getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  4322  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  4323  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4324  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  4325  
  4326  			})
  4327  			It(`Invoke GetGroupProfileControls with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  4328  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  4329  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  4330  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  4331  				})
  4332  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  4333  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  4334  
  4335  				// Construct an instance of the GetGroupProfileControlsOptions model
  4336  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetGroupProfileControlsOptions)
  4337  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.GroupID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4338  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4339  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4340  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  4341  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  4342  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  4343  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)
  4344  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("")

  4346  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetGroupProfileControls(getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel)
  4347  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4348  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring(core.ERRORMSG_SERVICE_URL_MISSING))
  4349  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  4350  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4351  				// Construct a second instance of the GetGroupProfileControlsOptions model with no property values
  4352  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.GetGroupProfileControlsOptions)
  4353  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)
  4354  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetGroupProfileControls(getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModelNew)
  4355  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4356  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  4357  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4358  			})
  4359  			AfterEach(func() {
  4360  				testServer.Close()
  4361  			})
  4362  		})
  4363  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with missing response body`, func() {
  4364  			BeforeEach(func() {
  4365  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  4366  					defer GinkgoRecover()

  4383  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4384  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4385  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  4386  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  4387  				getGroupProfileControlsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}

  4399  			})

  4401  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
  4402  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
  4403  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4404  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4405  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
  4406  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4407  
  4408  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4409  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4410  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
  4411  			})
  4412  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
  4413  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4414  
  4415  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4416  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4417  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4418  			})
  4419  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  4420  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4421  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4422  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
  4423  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4424  
  4425  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4426  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4427  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4428  			})
  4429  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  4430  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ControlList)
  4431  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  4432  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
  4433  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  4434  
  4435  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  4436  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
  4437  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  4438  			})
  4439  		})
  4440  	})
  4441  	Describe(`CreateScope(createScopeOptions *CreateScopeOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  4442  		createScopePath := "/posture/v2/scopes"
  4443  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  4444  			BeforeEach(func() {
  4445  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  4446  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  4447  
  4448  					// Verify the contents of the request
  4449  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createScopePath))
  4450  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  4451  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  4452  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  4453  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  4454  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  4455  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  4456  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  4457  				}))
  4458  			})
  4459  			It(`Invoke CreateScope with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  4460  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  4461  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  4462  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  4463  				})
  4464  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  4465  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  4466  
  4467  				// Construct an instance of the CreateScopeOptions model
  4468  				createScopeOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateScopeOptions)
  4469  				createScopeOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema-new-048-test")
  4470  				createScopeOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema")
  4471  				createScopeOptionsModel.CollectorIds = []string{"20"}
  4472  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialID = core.StringPtr("5")
  4473  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialType = core.StringPtr("on_premise")
  4474  				createScopeOptionsModel.Interval = core.Int64Ptr(int64(10))
  4475  				createScopeOptionsModel.IsDiscoveryScheduled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  4476  				createScopeOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4477  				createScopeOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4478  				createScopeOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  4479  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  4480  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateScope(createScopeOptionsModel)
  4481  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4482  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4483  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4484  
  4485  				// Enable retries and test again
  4486  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  4487  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateScope(createScopeOptionsModel)
  4488  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4489  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4490  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4491  			})
  4492  			AfterEach(func() {
  4493  				testServer.Close()
  4494  			})
  4495  		})
  4496  	})
  4497  	Describe(`CreateScope(createScopeOptions *CreateScopeOptions)`, func() {
  4498  		createScopePath := "/posture/v2/scopes"
  4499  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  4500  			BeforeEach(func() {
  4501  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  4502  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  4503  
  4504  					// Verify the contents of the request
  4505  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createScopePath))
  4506  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  4507  
  4508  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  4509  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  4510  
  4511  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  4512  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  4513  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  4514  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  4515  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4516  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  4517  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4518  					} else {
  4519  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  4520  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4521  					}
  4522  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  4523  
  4524  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())

  4526  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  4527  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test

  4529  
  4530  					// Set mock response

  4532  					res.WriteHeader(201)
  4533  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "ID", "name": "Name", "uuid": "UUID", "partner_uuid": "PartnerUUID", "description": "Description", "org_id": 5, "cloud_type_id": 11, "tld_credential_id":   4536  			It(`Invoke CreateScope successfully with retries`, func() {
  4537  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  4538  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  4539  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  4540  				})
  4541  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  4542  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  4543  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  4544  
  4545  				// Construct an instance of the CreateScopeOptions model
  4546  				createScopeOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateScopeOptions)
  4547  				createScopeOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema-new-048-test")
  4548  				createScopeOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema")
  4549  				createScopeOptionsModel.CollectorIds = []string{"20"}
  4550  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialID = core.StringPtr("5")
  4551  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialType = core.StringPtr("on_premise")
  4552  				createScopeOptionsModel.Interval = core.Int64Ptr(int64(10))
  4553  				createScopeOptionsModel.IsDiscoveryScheduled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  4554  				createScopeOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4555  				createScopeOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4556  				createScopeOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  4557  
  4558  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  4559  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  4560  				defer cancelFunc()
  4561  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateScopeWithContext(ctx, createScopeOptionsModel)
  4562  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4563  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  4564  
  4565  				// Disable retries and test again
  4566  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  4567  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateScope(createScopeOptionsModel)
  4568  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  4569  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4570  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  4571  
  4572  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  4573  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  4574  				defer cancelFunc2()
  4575  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateScopeWithContext(ctx, createScopeOptionsModel)
  4576  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4577  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  4578  			})
  4579  			AfterEach(func() {
  4580  				testServer.Close()
  4581  			})
  4582  		})
  4583  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  4584  			BeforeEach(func() {

  4590  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  4591  
  4592  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  4593  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  4594  
  4595  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  4596  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  4597  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  4598  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  4599  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4600  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  4601  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  4602  					} else {
  4603  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)

  4605  					}

  4610  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))

  4617  			It(`Invoke CreateScope successfully`, func() {
  4618  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  4619  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  4620  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  4621  				})

  4623  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  4624  
  4625  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  4626  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateScope(nil)
  4627  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  4628  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  4629  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4630  
  4631  				// Construct an instance of the CreateScopeOptions model
  4632  				createScopeOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateScopeOptions)
  4633  				createScopeOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema-new-048-test")
  4634  				createScopeOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema")
  4635  				createScopeOptionsModel.CollectorIds = []string{"20"}
  4636  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialID = core.StringPtr("5")
  4637  				createScopeOptionsModel.CredentialType = core.StringPtr("on_premise")
  4638  				createScopeOptionsModel.Interval = core.Int64Ptr(int64(10))
  4639  				createScopeOptionsModel.IsDiscoveryScheduled = core.BoolPtr(true)
  4640  				createScopeOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4641  				createScopeOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4642  				createScopeOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  4643  
  4644  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  4645  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateScope(createScopeOptionsModel)
  4646  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  4647  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4648  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  4649  
  4650  			})

  4654  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  4659  				// Construct an instance of the CreateScopeOptions model

  4661  				createScopeOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("IBMSchema-new-048-test")

  4675  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())

  4678  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())

  4686  			})
  4687  			AfterEach(func() {
  4688  				testServer.Close()
  4689  			})
  4690  		})

  4734  	Describe(`ListScopes(listScopesOptions *ListScopesOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  4735  		listScopesPath := "/posture/v2/scopes"
  4736  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  4737  			BeforeEach(func() {
  4738  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  4739  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  4740  
  4741  					// Verify the contents of the request
  4742  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listScopesPath))
  4743  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  4744  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  4745  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  4746  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  4747  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  4748  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  4749  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  4750  				}))
  4751  			})
  4752  			It(`Invoke ListScopes with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  4753  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  4754  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  4755  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  4756  				})
  4757  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  4758  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  4759  
  4760  				// Construct an instance of the ListScopesOptions model
  4761  				listScopesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListScopesOptions)
  4762  				listScopesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4763  				listScopesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  4764  				listScopesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  4765  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  4766  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListScopes(listScopesOptionsModel)
  4767  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4768  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4769  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4770  
  4771  				// Enable retries and test again
  4772  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  4773  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListScopes(listScopesOptionsModel)
  4774  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4775  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  4776  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4777  			})
  4778  			AfterEach(func() {
  4779  				testServer.Close()
  4780  			})
  4781  		})
  4782  	})
  4783  	Describe(`ListScopes(listScopesOptions *ListScopesOptions)`, func() {

  4809  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  4820  
  4821  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  4822  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  4823  				defer cancelFunc()
  4824  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListScopesWithContext(ctx, listScopesOptionsModel)
  4825  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4826  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  4827  
  4828  				// Disable retries and test again

  4833  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  4834

  4837  				defer cancelFunc2()
  4838  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListScopesWithContext(ctx, listScopesOptionsModel)
  4839  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  4840  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  4841  			})

  4843  				testServer.Close()
  4844  			})

  4989  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  4990

  5026  			It(`Invoke GetScopeDetails successfully with retries`, func() {
  5027  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5028  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5029  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5030  				})
  5031  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5032  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5033  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  5034  
  5035  				// Construct an instance of the GetScopeDetailsOptions model
  5036  				getScopeDetailsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetScopeDetailsOptions)
  5037  				getScopeDetailsOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5038  				getScopeDetailsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5039  				getScopeDetailsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5040  				getScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5041  
  5042  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  5043  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5044  				defer cancelFunc()
  5045  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeDetailsWithContext(ctx, getScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5046  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5047  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5048  
  5049  				// Disable retries and test again
  5050  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  5051  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeDetails(getScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5052  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  5053  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5054  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  5055  
  5056  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  5057  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5058  				defer cancelFunc2()
  5059  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetScopeDetailsWithContext(ctx, getScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5060  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5061  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5062  			})
  5063  			AfterEach(func() {
  5064  				testServer.Close()
  5065  			})
  5066  		})

  5184  	Describe(`UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptions *UpdateScopeDetailsOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  5185  		updateScopeDetailsPath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString"
  5186  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  5187  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5188  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5189  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5190  
  5191  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5192  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateScopeDetailsPath))
  5193  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  5194  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  5195  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  5196  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  5197  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  5198  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  5199  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  5200  				}))
  5201  			})
  5202  			It(`Invoke UpdateScopeDetails with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  5203  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5204  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5205  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5206  				})
  5207  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5208  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5209  
  5210  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateScopeDetailsOptions model
  5211  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateScopeDetailsOptions)
  5212  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5213  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("Scope Test1")
  5214  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("Scope Description")
  5215  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5216  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5217  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5218  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  5219  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5220  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5221  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5222  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  5223  
  5224  				// Enable retries and test again
  5225  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  5226  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5227  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5228  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5229  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  5230  			})
  5231  			AfterEach(func() {
  5232  				testServer.Close()
  5233  			})
  5234  		})
  5235  	})
  5236  	Describe(`UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptions *UpdateScopeDetailsOptions)`, func() {
  5237  		updateScopeDetailsPath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString"
  5238  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  5239  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5240  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5241  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5242  
  5243  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5244  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateScopeDetailsPath))
  5245  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  5246  
  5247  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  5248  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  5249  
  5250  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  5251  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  5252  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  5253  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  5254  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  5255  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  5256  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  5257  					} else {
  5258  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  5259  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  5260  					}
  5261  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  5262  
  5263  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  5264  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  5265  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  5266  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  5267  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  5268  
  5269  					// Set mock response
  5270  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  5271  					res.WriteHeader(200)

  5275  			It(`Invoke UpdateScopeDetails successfully with retries`, func() {
  5276  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5277  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5278  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5279  				})
  5280  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5281  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5282  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  5283  
  5284  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateScopeDetailsOptions model
  5285  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateScopeDetailsOptions)
  5286  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5287  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("Scope Test1")
  5288  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("Scope Description")
  5289  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5290  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5291  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5292  
  5293  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  5294  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5295  				defer cancelFunc()
  5296  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetailsWithContext(ctx, updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5297  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5298  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5299  
  5300  				// Disable retries and test again
  5301  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  5302  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5303  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  5304  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5305  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  5306  
  5307  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  5308  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5309  				defer cancelFunc2()
  5310  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetailsWithContext(ctx, updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5311  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5312  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5313  			})
  5314  			AfterEach(func() {
  5315  				testServer.Close()
  5316  			})
  5317  		})
  5318  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  5319  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5320  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5321  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5322  
  5323  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5324  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(updateScopeDetailsPath))
  5325  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  5326  
  5327  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  5328  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  5329  
  5330  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  5331  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  5332  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  5333  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  5334  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  5335  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  5336  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())

  5352  			It(`Invoke UpdateScopeDetails successfully`, func() {
  5353  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5354  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5355  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5356  				})
  5357  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5358  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5359  
  5360  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  5361  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetails(nil)
  5362  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  5363  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  5364  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  5365  
  5366  				// Construct an instance of the UpdateScopeDetailsOptions model
  5367  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.UpdateScopeDetailsOptions)
  5368  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.ID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5369  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Name = core.StringPtr("Scope Test1")
  5370  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Description = core.StringPtr("Scope Description")
  5371  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5372  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5373  				updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5374  
  5375  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  5376  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.UpdateScopeDetails(updateScopeDetailsOptionsModel)
  5377  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  5378  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
