  5532  	Describe(`GetScopeTimeline(getScopeTimelineOptions *GetScopeTimelineOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  5533  		getScopeTimelinePath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString/events"
  5534  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  5535  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5536  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5537  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5538  
  5539  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5540  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getScopeTimelinePath))
  5541  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  5542  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  5543  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  5544  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  5545  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  5546  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  5547  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  5548  				}))
  5549  			})
  5550  			It(`Invoke GetScopeTimeline with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  5551  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5552  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5553  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5554  				})
  5555  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5556  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5557  
  5558  				// Construct an instance of the GetScopeTimelineOptions model
  5559  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetScopeTimelineOptions)
  5560  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5561  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5562  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5563  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5564  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  5565  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeTimeline(getScopeTimelineOptionsModel)
  5566  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5567  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5568  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  5569  
  5570  				// Enable retries and test again
  5571  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  5572  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetScopeTimeline(getScopeTimelineOptionsModel)
  5573  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5574  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5575  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  5576  			})
  5577  			AfterEach(func() {
  5578  				testServer.Close()
  5579  			})
  5580  		})
  5581  	})
  5582  	Describe(`GetScopeTimeline(getScopeTimelineOptions *GetScopeTimelineOptions)`, func() {
  5583  		getScopeTimelinePath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString/events"
  5584  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  5585  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5586  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5587  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5588  
  5589  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5590  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getScopeTimelinePath))
  5591  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  5592  
  5593  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  5594  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  5595  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  5596  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  5597  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  5598  
  5599  					// Set mock response
  5600  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  5601  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  5602  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"events": [{"id": "ID", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "task_type": "discovery", "status": "discovery_completed", "data_available": true, "status_message": "Discovery is completed. Check the report."}]}`)
  5603  				}))
  5604  			})
  5605  			It(`Invoke GetScopeTimeline successfully with retries`, func() {
  5606  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  5607  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  5608  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  5609  				})
  5610  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  5611  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  5612  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  5613  
  5614  				// Construct an instance of the GetScopeTimelineOptions model
  5615  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.GetScopeTimelineOptions)
  5616  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5617  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5618  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  5619  				getScopeTimelineOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  5620  
  5621  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  5622  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5623  				defer cancelFunc()
  5624  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeTimelineWithContext(ctx, getScopeTimelineOptionsModel)
  5625  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5626  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5627  
  5628  				// Disable retries and test again
  5629  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  5630  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeTimeline(getScopeTimelineOptionsModel)
  5631  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  5632  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  5633  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  5634  
  5635  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  5636  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  5637  				defer cancelFunc2()
  5638  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetScopeTimelineWithContext(ctx, getScopeTimelineOptionsModel)
  5639  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  5640  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  5641  			})
  5642  			AfterEach(func() {
  5643  				testServer.Close()
  5644  			})
  5645  		})
  5646  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  5647  			BeforeEach(func() {
  5648  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  5649  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  5650  
  5651  					// Verify the contents of the request
  5652  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(getScopeTimelinePath))
  5653  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  5654  
  5655  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  5656  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  5657  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  5658  					// Set mock response
  5659  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  5660  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  5661  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"events": [{"id": "ID", "created_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "updated_at": "2021-02-26T04:07:25.000Z", "task_type": "discovery", "status": "discovery_completed", "data_available": true, "status_message": "Discovery is completed. Check the report."}]}`)
  5662  				}))
  5663  			})

  5764  		getScopeDetailsCredentialsPath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString/credentials"
  5765  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  5766  			BeforeEach(func() {

  5781  			It(`Invoke GetScopeDetailsCredentials with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {

  6321  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {

  6335  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  6336  					res.WriteHeader(200)

  6342  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  6343  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  6344  				})
  6345  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  6346  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())

  6352  				getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6353  				getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6354  				getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  6355  
  6356  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  6357  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  6358  				defer cancelFunc()
  6359  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeDetailsCollectorWithContext(ctx, getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6360  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6361  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  6362  
  6363  				// Disable retries and test again
  6364  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  6365  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.GetScopeDetailsCollector(getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6366  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  6367  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  6368  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  6369  
  6370  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  6371  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  6372  				defer cancelFunc2()
  6373  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.GetScopeDetailsCollectorWithContext(ctx, getScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6374  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6375  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  6376  			})
  6377  			AfterEach(func() {
  6378  				testServer.Close()
  6379  			})
  6380  		})

  6527  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.CollectorIds = []string{"7"}
  6528  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")

  6549  	Describe(`ReplaceScopeDetailsCollector(replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptions *ReplaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptions)`, func() {
  6550  		replaceScopeDetailsCollectorPath := "/posture/v2/scopes/testString/collectors"
  6551  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  6552  			BeforeEach(func() {
  6553  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  6554  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  6555  
  6556  					// Verify the contents of the request
  6557  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(replaceScopeDetailsCollectorPath))
  6558  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  6559  
  6560  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  6561  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  6562  
  6563  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  6564  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  6565  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  6566  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  6567  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6568  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  6569  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6570  					} else {
  6571  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  6572  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6573  					}
  6574  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  6575  
  6576  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  6577  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  6578  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  6579  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  6580  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  6581  
  6582  					// Set mock response
  6583  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  6584  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  6585  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"collector_ids": ["CollectorIds"]}`)
  6586  				}))
  6587  			})
  6588  			It(`Invoke ReplaceScopeDetailsCollector successfully with retries`, func() {
  6589  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  6590  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  6591  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  6592  				})
  6593  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  6594  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  6595  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  6596  
  6597  				// Construct an instance of the ReplaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptions model
  6598  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ReplaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptions)
  6599  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6600  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.CollectorIds = []string{"7"}
  6601  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6602  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6603  				replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  6604  
  6605  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  6606  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  6607  				defer cancelFunc()
  6608  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ReplaceScopeDetailsCollectorWithContext(ctx, replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6609  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6610  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  6611  
  6612  				// Disable retries and test again
  6613  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  6614  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ReplaceScopeDetailsCollector(replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6615  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  6616  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  6617  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  6618  
  6619  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  6620  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  6621  				defer cancelFunc2()
  6622  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ReplaceScopeDetailsCollectorWithContext(ctx, replaceScopeDetailsCollectorOptionsModel)
  6623  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6624  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  6625  			})
  6626  			AfterEach(func() {
  6627  				testServer.Close()
  6628  			})
  6629  		})
  6630  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  6631  			BeforeEach(func() {
  6632  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  6633  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  6634  
  6635  					// Verify the contents of the request
  6636  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(replaceScopeDetailsCollectorPath))
  6637  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("PATCH"))
  6638  
  6639  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  6640  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  6641  
  6642  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  6643  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  6644  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  6645  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  6646  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6647  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  6648  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6649  					} else {
  6650  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  6651  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  6652  					}
  6653  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  6654  
  6655  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  6656  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  6657  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  6658  					// Set mock response
  6659  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  6660  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  6661  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"collector_ids": ["CollectorIds"]}`)
  6662  				}))
  6663  			})

  6767  		getCorrelationIDPath := "/posture/v2/scope/status/testString"
  6768  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  6769  			BeforeEach(func() {

  6778  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))

  6791

  6795  				getCorrelationIDOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6796  				getCorrelationIDOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  6797  				getCorrelationIDOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}

  6800  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6801  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  6802  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  6803  
  6804  				// Enable retries and test again

  6807  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6808  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  6809  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  6810  			})

  6812  				testServer.Close()
  6813  			})
  6814  		})
  6815  	})

  6830  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test

  6832

  6834  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  6835  					res.WriteHeader(200)

  6837  				}))

  6861

  6873  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  6874  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  6875  			})

  6878  			})
  6879  		})

  6997  	Describe(`ListLatestScans(listLatestScansOptions *ListLatestScansOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  6998  		listLatestScansPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/latest_scans"
  6999  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  7000  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7001  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7002  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7003  
  7004  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7005  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(listLatestScansPath))
  7006  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7007  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7008  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7009  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7010  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  7011  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7012  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7013  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7014  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  7015  				}))
  7016  			})
  7017  			It(`Invoke ListLatestScans with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  7018  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7019  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7020  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7021  				})
  7022  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())

  7025  				// Construct an instance of the ListLatestScansOptions model

  7027  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7028  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7029  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  7030  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))

  7037

  7045  			AfterEach(func() {
  7046  				testServer.Close()
  7047  			})

  7049  	})
  7050  	Describe(`ListLatestScans(listLatestScansOptions *ListLatestScansOptions)`, func() {
  7051  		listLatestScansPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/latest_scans"
  7052  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  7053  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7054  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7055  					defer GinkgoRecover()

  7059  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7060  
  7061  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7062  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7063  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7064  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  7065  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7066  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  7067  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  7068  
  7069  					// Set mock response
  7070  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7071  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7072  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "latest_scans": [{"scan_id": "262", "scan_name": "IBM_Schema_Full - IBMCloudBestPractice", "scope_id": "21", "scope_name": "IBM_Schema_Full", "profiles": [{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "id": "1", "type": "predefined"}], "group_profile_id": "1", "group_profile_name": "CIS Windows Server Benchmarks", "report_run_by": "controller", "start_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "report_setting_id": "66", "end_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "result": {"goals_pass_count": 118, "goals_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "goals_not_applicable_count": 6, "goals_fail_count": 154, "goals_total_count": 294, "controls_pass_count": 117, "controls_fail_count": 154, "controls_not_applicable_count": 6, "controls_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "controls_total_count": 293}}]}`)
  7073  				}))
  7074  			})
  7075  			It(`Invoke ListLatestScans successfully with retries`, func() {
  7076  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7077  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7078  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7079  				})
  7080  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7081  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7082  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7083  
  7084  				// Construct an instance of the ListLatestScansOptions model
  7085  				listLatestScansOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ListLatestScansOptions)
  7086  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7087  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7088  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  7089  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  7090  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7091  
  7092  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  7093  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7094  				defer cancelFunc()
  7095  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListLatestScansWithContext(ctx, listLatestScansOptionsModel)
  7096  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7097  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7098  
  7099  				// Disable retries and test again
  7100  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  7101  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ListLatestScans(listLatestScansOptionsModel)
  7102  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7103  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7104  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  7105  
  7106  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  7107  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7108  				defer cancelFunc2()
  7109  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ListLatestScansWithContext(ctx, listLatestScansOptionsModel)
  7110  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7111  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7112  			})
  7113  			AfterEach(func() {
  7114  				testServer.Close()
  7115  			})
  7116  		})
  7117  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {

  7130  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7131  					// Set mock response

  7134  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "latest_scans": [{"scan_id": "262", "scan_name": "IBM_Schema_Full - IBMCloudBestPractice", "scope_id": "21", "scope_name": "IBM_Schema_Full", "profiles": [{"name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "id": "1", "type": "predefined"}], "group_profile_id": "1", "group_profile_name": "CIS Windows Server Benchmarks", "report_run_by": "controller", "start_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "report_setting_id": "66", "end_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "result": {"goals_pass_count": 118, "goals_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "goals_not_applicable_count": 6, "goals_fail_count": 154, "goals_total_count": 294, "controls_pass_count": 117, "controls_fail_count": 154, "controls_not_applicable_count": 6, "controls_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "controls_total_count": 293}}]}`)

  7137  			It(`Invoke ListLatestScans successfully`, func() {

  7140  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  7189  			})
  7190  			AfterEach(func() {

  7192  			})
  7193  		})
  7194  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with missing response body`, func() {

  7208  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())

  7210  
  7211  				// Construct an instance of the ListLatestScansOptions model

  7214  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7215  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  7216  				listLatestScansOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))

  7218

  7231  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
  7232  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
  7233  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanList)
  7234  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  7235  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
  7236  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  7237  
  7238  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  7239  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7240  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
  7241  			})
  7242  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
  7243  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanList)
  7244  
  7245  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  7246  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7247  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  7248  			})
  7249  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  7250  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanList)
  7251  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  7252  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
  7253  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  7254  
  7255  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  7256  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7257  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  7258  			})
  7259  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  7260  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanList)
  7261  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  7262  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
  7263  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  7264  
  7265  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  7266  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
  7267  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  7268  			})
  7269  		})
  7270  	})
  7271  	Describe(`CreateValidation(createValidationOptions *CreateValidationOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  7272  		createValidationPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations"
  7273  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  7274  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7275  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7276  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7277  
  7278  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7279  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createValidationPath))
  7280  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  7281  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7282  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7283  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7284  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7285  					res.WriteHeader(202)
  7286  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  7287  				}))
  7288  			})
  7289  			It(`Invoke CreateValidation with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  7290  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7291  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7292  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7293  				})
  7294  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7295  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7296  
  7297  				// Construct an instance of the CreateValidationOptions model
  7298  				createValidationOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateValidationOptions)
  7299  				createValidationOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("1")
  7300  				createValidationOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("6")
  7301  				createValidationOptionsModel.GroupProfileID = core.StringPtr("13")
  7302  				createValidationOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7303  				createValidationOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7304  				createValidationOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7305  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  7306  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateValidation(createValidationOptionsModel)
  7307  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7308  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7309  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7310  
  7311  				// Enable retries and test again
  7312  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7313  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateValidation(createValidationOptionsModel)
  7314  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7315  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7316  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7317  			})
  7318  			AfterEach(func() {
  7319  				testServer.Close()
  7320  			})
  7321  		})
  7322  	})
  7323  	Describe(`CreateValidation(createValidationOptions *CreateValidationOptions)`, func() {
  7324  		createValidationPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations"
  7325  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  7326  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7327  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7328  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7329  
  7330  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7331  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createValidationPath))
  7332  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  7333  
  7334  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  7335  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  7336  
  7337  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  7338  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  7339  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  7340  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  7341  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7342  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  7343  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7344  					} else {
  7345  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  7346  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7347  					}
  7348  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  7349  
  7350  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7351  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7352  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7353  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  7354  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  7355  
  7356  					// Set mock response
  7357  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7358  					res.WriteHeader(202)
  7359  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"result": true, "message": "Success: The validation is in progress. To see the results, go to Security & Compliance > Assess > Scans in the service dashboard and select the scan My_Example_scan."}`)
  7360  				}))
  7361  			})
  7362  			It(`Invoke CreateValidation successfully with retries`, func() {
  7363  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7364  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7365  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7366  				})
  7367  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7368  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7369  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7370  
  7371  				// Construct an instance of the CreateValidationOptions model
  7372  				createValidationOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateValidationOptions)
  7373  				createValidationOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("1")
  7374  				createValidationOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("6")
  7375  				createValidationOptionsModel.GroupProfileID = core.StringPtr("13")
  7376  				createValidationOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7377  				createValidationOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7378  				createValidationOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7379  
  7380  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  7381  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7382  				defer cancelFunc()
  7383  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateValidationWithContext(ctx, createValidationOptionsModel)
  7384  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7385  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7386  
  7387  				// Disable retries and test again
  7388  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  7389  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.CreateValidation(createValidationOptionsModel)
  7390  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7391  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7392  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  7393  
  7394  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  7395  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7396  				defer cancelFunc2()
  7397  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateValidationWithContext(ctx, createValidationOptionsModel)
  7398  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7399  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7400  			})
  7401  			AfterEach(func() {
  7402  				testServer.Close()
  7403  			})
  7404  		})
  7405  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  7406  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7407  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7408  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7409  
  7410  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7411  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(createValidationPath))
  7412  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("POST"))
  7413  
  7414  					// For gzip-disabled operation, verify Content-Encoding is not set.
  7415  					Expect(req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding")).To(BeEmpty())
  7416  
  7417  					// If there is a body, then make sure we can read it
  7418  					bodyBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)
  7419  					if req.Header.Get("Content-Encoding") == "gzip" {
  7420  						body, err := core.NewGzipDecompressionReader(req.Body)
  7421  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7422  						_, err = bodyBuf.ReadFrom(body)
  7423  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7424  					} else {
  7425  						_, err := bodyBuf.ReadFrom(req.Body)
  7426  						Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7427  					}
  7428  					fmt.Fprintf(GinkgoWriter, "  Request body: %s", bodyBuf.String())
  7429  
  7430  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7431  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7432  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7433  					// Set mock response
  7434  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7435  					res.WriteHeader(202)
  7436  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"result": true, "message": "Success: The validation is in progress. To see the results, go to Security & Compliance > Assess > Scans in the service dashboard and select the scan My_Example_scan."}`)
  7437  				}))
  7438  			})
  7439  			It(`Invoke CreateValidation successfully`, func() {
  7440  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7441  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7442  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7443  				})
  7444  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7445  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7446  
  7447  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)

  7449  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  7450  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  7451  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7452  
  7453  				// Construct an instance of the CreateValidationOptions model
  7454  				createValidationOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.CreateValidationOptions)
  7455  				createValidationOptionsModel.ScopeID = core.StringPtr("1")
  7456  				createValidationOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("6")
  7457  				createValidationOptionsModel.GroupProfileID = core.StringPtr("13")
  7458  				createValidationOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7459  				createValidationOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7460  				createValidationOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7461  
  7462  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  7463  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.CreateValidation(createValidationOptionsModel)
  7464  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7465  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7466  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  7467  
  7468  			})
  7469  			It(`Invoke CreateValidation with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  7470  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7471  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7472  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7473  				})
  7474  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())

  7476  
  7477  				// Construct an instance of the CreateValidationOptions model

  7481  				createValidationOptionsModel.GroupProfileID = core.StringPtr("13")
  7482  				createValidationOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7483  				createValidationOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")

  7492  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())

  7498  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  7499  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7500  			})
  7501  			AfterEach(func() {
  7502  				testServer.Close()
  7503  			})
  7504  		})

  7544  	Describe(`ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptions *ScansSummaryOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  7545  		scansSummaryPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/testString/summary"
  7546  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  7547  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7548  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7549  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7550  
  7551  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7552  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(scansSummaryPath))
  7553  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7554  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7555  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7556  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7557  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7558  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7559  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7560  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  7561  				}))
  7562  			})
  7563  			It(`Invoke ScansSummary with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  7564  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7565  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7566  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7567  				})
  7568  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7569  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7570  
  7571  				// Construct an instance of the ScansSummaryOptions model
  7572  				scansSummaryOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScansSummaryOptions)
  7573  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ScanID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7574  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7575  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7576  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7577  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7578  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  7579  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7580  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7581  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7582  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7583  
  7584  				// Enable retries and test again
  7585  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7586  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7587  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7588  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7589  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7590  			})
  7591  			AfterEach(func() {
  7592  				testServer.Close()
  7593  			})
  7594  		})
  7595  	})
  7596  	Describe(`ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptions *ScansSummaryOptions)`, func() {
  7597  		scansSummaryPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/testString/summary"
  7598  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  7599  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7600  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7601  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7602  
  7603  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7604  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(scansSummaryPath))
  7605  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7606  
  7607  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7608  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7609  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7610  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7611  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  7612  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  7613  
  7614  					// Set mock response
  7615  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7616  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7617  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "4", "discover_id": "8", "profile_id": "50", "profile_name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "scope_id": "2", "controls": [{"id": "7907", "status": "pass", "external_control_id": "50", "description": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "goals": [{"description": "Check whether API keys unused for 180 days are detected and optionally disabled", "id": "3000039", "status": "pass", "severity": "Medium", "completed_time": "2021-04-16T05:32:44.000Z", "error": "N/A", "resource_result": [{"name": "PasswordPolicy", "types": "Identity and Access Management", "status": "pass", "display_expected_value": "IBMid password policy requires at least one lowercase letter", "actual_value": "{\"2fa\": \"Enabled\"}", "results_info": "IBMid password policy minimum password length is set to 8", "not_applicable_reason": "{\"isBootVolume\": \"True\"}"}], "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}}], "resource_statistics": {"pass_count": 4, "fail_count": 4, "unable_to_perform_count": 4, "not_applicable_count": 4}}]}`)
  7618  				}))
  7619  			})
  7620  			It(`Invoke ScansSummary successfully with retries`, func() {
  7621  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7622  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7623  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7624  				})
  7625  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7626  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7627  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7628  
  7629  				// Construct an instance of the ScansSummaryOptions model
  7630  				scansSummaryOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScansSummaryOptions)
  7631  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ScanID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7632  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7633  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7634  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7635  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7636  
  7637  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  7638  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7639  				defer cancelFunc()
  7640  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScansSummaryWithContext(ctx, scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7641  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7642  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7643  
  7644  				// Disable retries and test again
  7645  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  7646  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7647  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7648  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7649  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  7650  
  7651  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  7652  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7653  				defer cancelFunc2()
  7654  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ScansSummaryWithContext(ctx, scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7655  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7656  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7657  			})
  7658  			AfterEach(func() {
  7659  				testServer.Close()
  7660  			})
  7661  		})
  7662  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  7663  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7664  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7665  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7666  
  7667  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7668  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(scansSummaryPath))
  7669  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7670  
  7671  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7672  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7673  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["profile_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7674  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7675  					// Set mock response
  7676  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7677  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7678  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"id": "4", "discover_id": "8", "profile_id": "50", "profile_name": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "scope_id": "2", "controls": [{"id": "7907", "status": "pass", "external_control_id": "50", "description": "CIS IBM Foundations Benchmark 1.0.0", "goals": [{"description": "Check whether API keys unused for 180 days are detected and optionally disabled", "id": "3000039", "status": "pass", "severity": "Medium", "completed_time": "2021-04-16T05:32:44.000Z", "error": "N/A", "resource_result": [{"name": "PasswordPolicy", "types": "Identity and Access Management", "status": "pass", "display_expected_value": "IBMid password policy requires at least one lowercase letter", "actual_value": "{\"2fa\": \"Enabled\"}", "results_info": "IBMid password policy minimum password length is set to 8", "not_applicable_reason": "{\"isBootVolume\": \"True\"}"}], "applicability_criteria": {"environment": ["ibm"], "resource": ["cloud_object_storage"], "environment_category": ["cloud_platform"], "resource_category": ["xaas"], "resource_type": ["storage"], "software_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "os_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "additional_details": {"anyKey": "anyValue"}, "environment_category_description": {"mapKey": "Cloud"}, "environment_description": {"mapKey": "IBM Cloud"}, "resource_category_description": {"mapKey": "Storage"}, "resource_type_description": {"mapKey": "Bucket"}, "resource_description": {"mapKey": "My_specific_bucket"}}}], "resource_statistics": {"pass_count": 4, "fail_count": 4, "unable_to_perform_count": 4, "not_applicable_count": 4}}]}`)
  7679  				}))
  7680  			})
  7681  			It(`Invoke ScansSummary successfully`, func() {
  7682  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7683  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7684  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7685  				})
  7686  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7687  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7688  
  7689  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)
  7690  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScansSummary(nil)
  7691  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  7692  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  7693  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7694  
  7695  				// Construct an instance of the ScansSummaryOptions model
  7696  				scansSummaryOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScansSummaryOptions)
  7697  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ScanID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7698  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7699  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7700  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7701  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7702  
  7703  				// Invoke operation with valid options model (positive test)
  7704  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7705  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7706  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7707  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())

  7709  			})
  7710  			It(`Invoke ScansSummary with error: Operation validation and request error`, func() {
  7711  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7712  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7713  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7714  				})
  7715  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7716  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7717  
  7718  				// Construct an instance of the ScansSummaryOptions model
  7719  				scansSummaryOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScansSummaryOptions)
  7720  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ScanID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7721  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7722  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7723  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7724  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7725  				// Invoke operation with empty URL (negative test)
  7726  				err := postureManagementService.SetServiceURL("")
  7727  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  7728  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScansSummary(scansSummaryOptionsModel)
  7729  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7730  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring(core.ERRORMSG_SERVICE_URL_MISSING))
  7731  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  7732  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7733  				// Construct a second instance of the ScansSummaryOptions model with no property values
  7734  				scansSummaryOptionsModelNew := new(posturemanagementv2.ScansSummaryOptions)
  7735  				// Invoke operation with invalid model (negative test)

  7737  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7738  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())
  7739  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7740  			})
  7741  			AfterEach(func() {
  7742  				testServer.Close()
  7743  			})
  7744  		})

  7765  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.ProfileID = core.StringPtr("testString")

  7767  				scansSummaryOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")

  7774  
  7775  				// Verify a nil result

  7778  			AfterEach(func() {

  7780  			})
  7781  		})
  7782  	})
  7783  	Describe(`ScanSummaries(scanSummariesOptions *ScanSummariesOptions) - Operation response error`, func() {
  7784  		scanSummariesPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/summaries"
  7785  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with invalid JSON response`, func() {
  7786  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7787  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7788  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7789  
  7790  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7791  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(scanSummariesPath))
  7792  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7793  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7794  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7795  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["report_setting_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7796  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7797  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  7798  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7799  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7800  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7801  					fmt.Fprintf(res, `} this is not valid json {`)
  7802  				}))
  7803  			})
  7804  			It(`Invoke ScanSummaries with error: Operation response processing error`, func() {
  7805  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7806  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7807  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7808  				})
  7809  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7810  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7811  
  7812  				// Construct an instance of the ScanSummariesOptions model
  7813  				scanSummariesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanSummariesOptions)
  7814  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.ReportSettingID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7815  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7816  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7817  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  7818  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  7819  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7820  				// Expect response parsing to fail since we are receiving a text/plain response
  7821  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScanSummaries(scanSummariesOptionsModel)
  7822  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7823  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7824  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7825  
  7826  				// Enable retries and test again
  7827  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7828  				result, response, operationErr = postureManagementService.ScanSummaries(scanSummariesOptionsModel)
  7829  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7830  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7831  				Expect(result).To(BeNil())
  7832  			})
  7833  			AfterEach(func() {
  7834  				testServer.Close()
  7835  			})
  7836  		})
  7837  	})
  7838  	Describe(`ScanSummaries(scanSummariesOptions *ScanSummariesOptions)`, func() {
  7839  		scanSummariesPath := "/posture/v2/scans/validations/summaries"
  7840  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint with timeout`, func() {
  7841  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7842  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7843  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7844  
  7845  					// Verify the contents of the request
  7846  					Expect(req.URL.EscapedPath()).To(Equal(scanSummariesPath))
  7847  					Expect(req.Method).To(Equal("GET"))
  7848  
  7849  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"]).ToNot(BeNil())
  7850  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))
  7851  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["report_setting_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7852  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7853  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  7854  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7855  					// Sleep a short time to support a timeout test
  7856  					time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
  7857  
  7858  					// Set mock response
  7859  					res.Header().Set("Content-type", "application/json")
  7860  					res.WriteHeader(200)
  7861  					fmt.Fprintf(res, "%s", `{"offset": 10, "limit": 15, "total_count": 50, "first": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "last": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "previous": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "next": {"href": "https://us-south.cloud.ibm.com/posture/v2/profiles/groups/1/controls?account_id=d194db5f52544a8f953aa539ced9b570&offset=10&limit=15"}, "summaries": [{"id": "262", "name": "IBM_Schema_Full - IBMCloudBestPractice", "scope_id": "21", "scope_name": "IBM_Schema_Full", "report_run_by": "controller", "start_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "end_time": "2020-09-23T12:45:24.000Z", "status": "validation_completed", "profiles": [{"id": "48", "name": "IBM Cloud Best Practices Controls 1.0", "type": "standard", "validation_result": {"goals_pass_count": 118, "goals_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "goals_not_applicable_count": 6, "goals_fail_count": 154, "goals_total_count": 294, "controls_pass_count": 117, "controls_fail_count": 154, "controls_not_applicable_count": 6, "controls_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "controls_total_count": 293}}], "group_profiles": [{"id": "48", "name": "IBM Cloud Best Practices Controls 1.0", "type": "standard", "validation_result": {"goals_pass_count": 118, "goals_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "goals_not_applicable_count": 6, "goals_fail_count": 154, "goals_total_count": 294, "controls_pass_count": 117, "controls_fail_count": 154, "controls_not_applicable_count": 6, "controls_unable_to_perform_count": 16, "controls_total_count": 293}}]}]}`)
  7862  				}))
  7863  			})
  7864  			It(`Invoke ScanSummaries successfully with retries`, func() {
  7865  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7866  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7867  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7868  				})
  7869  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7870  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7871  				postureManagementService.EnableRetries(0, 0)
  7872  
  7873  				// Construct an instance of the ScanSummariesOptions model
  7874  				scanSummariesOptionsModel := new(posturemanagementv2.ScanSummariesOptions)
  7875  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.ReportSettingID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7876  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.AccountID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7877  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.TransactionID = core.StringPtr("testString")
  7878  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Offset = core.Int64Ptr(int64(38))
  7879  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Limit = core.Int64Ptr(int64(100))
  7880  				scanSummariesOptionsModel.Headers = map[string]string{"x-custom-header": "x-custom-value"}
  7881  
  7882  				// Invoke operation with a Context to test a timeout error
  7883  				ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7884  				defer cancelFunc()
  7885  				_, _, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScanSummariesWithContext(ctx, scanSummariesOptionsModel)
  7886  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7887  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7888  
  7889  				// Disable retries and test again
  7890  				postureManagementService.DisableRetries()
  7891  				result, response, operationErr := postureManagementService.ScanSummaries(scanSummariesOptionsModel)
  7892  				Expect(operationErr).To(BeNil())
  7893  				Expect(response).ToNot(BeNil())
  7894  				Expect(result).ToNot(BeNil())
  7895  
  7896  				// Re-test the timeout error with retries disabled
  7897  				ctx, cancelFunc2 := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 80*time.Millisecond)
  7898  				defer cancelFunc2()
  7899  				_, _, operationErr = postureManagementService.ScanSummariesWithContext(ctx, scanSummariesOptionsModel)
  7900  				Expect(operationErr).ToNot(BeNil())
  7901  				Expect(operationErr.Error()).To(ContainSubstring("deadline exceeded"))
  7902  			})
  7903  			AfterEach(func() {
  7904  				testServer.Close()
  7905  			})
  7906  		})
  7907  		Context(`Using mock server endpoint`, func() {
  7908  			BeforeEach(func() {
  7909  				testServer = httptest.NewServer(http.HandlerFunc(func(res http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
  7910  					defer GinkgoRecover()
  7911  
  7912  					// Verify the contents of the request

  7915

  7917  					Expect(req.Header["Transaction-Id"][0]).To(Equal(fmt.Sprintf("%v", "testString")))

  7919  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["account_id"]).To(Equal([]string{"testString"}))
  7920  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["offset"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(38))}))
  7921  					Expect(req.URL.Query()["limit"]).To(Equal([]string{fmt.Sprint(int64(100))}))
  7922  					// Set mock response

  7926  				}))
  7927  			})
  7928  			It(`Invoke ScanSummaries successfully`, func() {
  7929  				postureManagementService, serviceErr := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{
  7930  					URL:           testServer.URL,
  7931  					Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},
  7932  				})
  7933  				Expect(serviceErr).To(BeNil())
  7934  				Expect(postureManagementService).ToNot(BeNil())
  7935  
  7936  				// Invoke operation with nil options model (negative test)

  7938  				Expect(operationErr).NotTo(BeNil())
  7939  				Expect(response).To(BeNil())

  7957  			})

  8032  		Context(`Test pagination helper method on response`, func() {
  8033  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset successfully`, func() {
  8034  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.SummaryList)
  8035  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  8036  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=135")
  8037  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  8038  
  8039  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  8040  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  8041  				Expect(value).To(Equal(core.Int64Ptr(int64(135))))
  8042  			})
  8043  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without a "Next" property in the response`, func() {
  8044  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.SummaryList)
  8045  
  8046  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  8047  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  8048  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  8049  			})
  8050  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset without any query params in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  8051  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.SummaryList)
  8052  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  8053  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com")
  8054  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  8055  
  8056  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  8057  				Expect(err).To(BeNil())
  8058  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  8059  			})
  8060  			It(`Invoke GetNextOffset with a non-integer query param in the "Next" URL`, func() {
  8061  				responseObject := new(posturemanagementv2.SummaryList)
  8062  				nextObject := new(posturemanagementv2.PageLink)
  8063  				nextObject.Href = core.StringPtr("ibm.com?offset=tiger")
  8064  				responseObject.Next = nextObject
  8065  
  8066  				value, err := responseObject.GetNextOffset()
  8067  				Expect(err).NotTo(BeNil())
  8068  				Expect(value).To(BeNil())
  8069  			})
  8070  		})
  8071  	})
  8072  	Describe(`Model constructor tests`, func() {
  8073  		Context(`Using a service client instance`, func() {
  8074  			postureManagementService, _ := posturemanagementv2.NewPostureManagementV2(&posturemanagementv2.PostureManagementV2Options{

  8076  				Authenticator: &core.NoAuthAuthenticator{},

  8694  				id := "testString"
  8695  				updateCredentialOptionsModel := postureManagementService.NewUpdateCredentialOptions(id)
  8696  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetID("testString")
  8697  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetEnabled(true)
  8698  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetType("username_password")
  8699  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetName("test_create")
  8700  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetDescription("This credential is used for testing.")
  8701  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetDisplayFields(updateCredentialDisplayFieldsModel)
  8702  				updateCredentialOptionsModel.SetPurpose("discovery_fact_collection_remediation")

  8788  //
  8789  // Utility functions used by the generated test code
  8790  //
  8791  
  8792  func CreateMockByteArray(mockData string) *[]byte {
  8793  	ba := make([]byte, 0)
  8794  	ba = append(ba, mockData...)
  8795  	return &ba
  8796  }
  8797  
  8798  func CreateMockUUID(mockData string) *strfmt.UUID {
  8799  	uuid := strfmt.UUID(mockData)
  8800  	return &uuid
  8801  }
  8802  
  8803  func CreateMockReader(mockData string) io.ReadCloser {
  8804  	return ioutil.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader([]byte(mockData)))
  8805  }
  8806  
  8807  func CreateMockDate(mockData string) *strfmt.Date {
  8808  	d, err := core.ParseDate(mockData)
  8809  	if err != nil {
  8810  		return nil
  8811  	}
  8812  	return &d
  8813  }
  8814  
  8815  func CreateMockDateTime(mockData string) *strfmt.DateTime {
  8816  	d, err := core.ParseDateTime(mockData)
  8817  	if err != nil {
  8818  		return nil
  8819  	}
  8820  	return &d
  8821  }
  8822  
  8823  func SetTestEnvironment(testEnvironment map[string]string) {
  8824  	for key, value := range testEnvironment {
  8825  		os.Setenv(key, value)
  8826  	}
  8827  }
  8828  
  8829  func ClearTestEnvironment(testEnvironment map[string]string) {
  8830  	for key := range testEnvironment {
  8831  		os.Unsetenv(key)
  8832  	}
  8833  }
